## Cloud & Devops Mcp Servers

- [Amazon Bedrock AgentCore MCP Server](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/mcp-getting-started.html) - Official Model Context Protocol server for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that transforms, deploys, and tests agents with built-in runtime integration, gateway connectivity, and agent lifecycle management. Supports stateful MCP features including elicitation, sampling, and progress notifications. ([Read more](/details/amazon-bedrock-agentcore-mcp-server.md)) `Aws` `Enterprise` `Ai Agents`
- [Argo CD Official MCP Server](https://github.com/argoproj-labs/mcp-for-argocd) - GitOps continuous delivery server from Argo CD Labs enabling natural language interactions with Kubernetes applications. Supports application management, sync operations, rollback, RBAC, and multi-tenancy through conversational AI. ([Read more](/details/argo-cd-official-mcp-server.md)) `Gitops` `Kubernetes` `Continuous Delivery`
- [AWS Official MCP Server](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp) - Official AWS MCP server from awslabs providing AI applications access to AWS documentation, contextual guidance, and best practices. Enables enhanced cloud-native development, infrastructure management, and development workflows. ([Read more](/details/aws-official-mcp-server.md)) `Cloud` `Aws` `Infrastructure`
- [AWS Terraform Best Practices MCP](https://awslabs.github.io/mcp/servers/terraform-mcp-server) - Specialized MCP server providing prescriptive Terraform advice for AWS deployments with infrastructure patterns, security compliance via Checkov, and AWS-specific best practices guidance. ([Read more](/details/aws-terraform-best-practices-mcp.md)) `Aws` `Terraform` `Security`
- [Cloudflare Workers MCP](https://github.com/cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare) - Official Cloudflare Model Context Protocol implementation for deploying MCP servers to 300+ edge locations worldwide with zero cold starts, automatic scaling, and built-in DDoS protection on Cloudflare's global network. ([Read more](/details/cloudflare-workers-mcp.md)) `Serverless` `Edge Computing` `Cloudflare`
- [Cloudflare Workers MCP Server](https://github.com/cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare) - Official Cloudflare MCP server providing access to over 2,500 Cloudflare API endpoints across DNS, Workers, R2, Zero Trust, and all Cloudflare products. Uses innovative Codemode technique for scalable API integration running in isolated Dynamic Worker sandboxes. ([Read more](/details/cloudflare-workers-mcp-server.md)) `Edge Computing` `Serverless` `Cdn`
- [Docker Kubernetes MCP Toolkit](https://collabnix.com/5-minutes-to-kubernetes-mcp-server-using-docker-mcp-tookit/) - Comprehensive Docker MCP toolkit providing 40+ specialized tools for container management, Kubernetes operations, Helm deployments, and port forwarding. Manage Docker Desktop Kubernetes clusters directly from AI assistants. ([Read more](/details/docker-kubernetes-mcp-toolkit.md)) `Docker` `Kubernetes` `Containers`
- [GCP Official MCP Server](https://www.datacamp.com/tutorial/google-mcp-servers) - Official Google Cloud Platform MCP server providing four operational remote servers for dataset operations, virtual machine management, Kubernetes administration, and comprehensive GCP service integration. ([Read more](/details/gcp-official-mcp-server.md)) `Gcp` `Google Cloud` `Official`
- [GitHub Actions MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - Official GitHub MCP server with rich capabilities mirroring GitHub platform APIs. Supports workflow management, repository operations, and CI/CD automation with optional read-only mode to prevent agent mutations. ([Read more](/details/github-actions-mcp-server.md)) `Ci Cd` `Github` `Automation`
- [Google Cloud Managed MCP](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/databases/managed-mcp-servers-for-google-cloud-databases) - Enterprise-ready managed MCP servers from Google Cloud supporting services like BigQuery, AlloyDB, Cloud SQL, Spanner, Firestore, Bigtable, and Google Maps. Provides globally consistent endpoints for AI agents to access Google Cloud services. ([Read more](/details/google-cloud-managed-mcp.md)) `Cloud Platform` `Gcp` `Managed Service`
- [Google Cloud MCP Integration](https://cloud.google.com/mcp) - Google Cloud integration for Model Context Protocol with Kotlin SDK collaboration. Part of Google's effort to build an open, secure AI ecosystem with MCP alongside Anthropic, JetBrains, and industry leaders. ([Read more](/details/google-cloud-mcp-integration.md)) `Cloud` `Google Cloud` `Infrastructure`
- [HashiCorp Terraform MCP Server](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/mcp-server) - Official Terraform MCP server providing seamless integration with the Terraform ecosystem, enabling AI models to access current provider documentation, modules, and policies with real-time registry integration. ([Read more](/details/hashicorp-terraform-mcp-server.md)) `Terraform` `Infrastructure` `Official`
- [kubectl MCP Server](https://github.com/rohitg00/kubectl-mcp-server) - Multi-platform Model Context Protocol server for Kubernetes enabling AI assistants to control infrastructure through natural language with support for debugging, cost optimization, deployments, security audits, and Helm charts. ([Read more](/details/kubectl-mcp-server.md)) `Kubernetes` `Kubectl` `Infrastructure`
- [Kubernetes Native MCP Server](https://github.com/containers/kubernetes-mcp-server) - A Go-based native Kubernetes MCP server that interacts directly with the Kubernetes API server, enabling AI assistants to run kubectl-like commands, inspect resources, view events, and debug cluster failures without wrapping kubectl. ([Read more](/details/kubernetes-native-mcp-server.md)) `Kubernetes` `Container Orchestration` `Devops`
- [Microsoft Azure MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/mcp) - Comprehensive MCP server from Microsoft that consolidates Azure service access into a single interface. Supports cloud role-based access controls, Azure Monitor log analysis, Cosmos DB administration, and other Azure operations through AI assistants. ([Read more](/details/microsoft-azure-mcp-server.md)) `Cloud Platform` `Azure` `Infrastructure`
- [Microsoft MCP Servers Catalog](https://github.com/microsoft/mcp) - Official catalog of Microsoft Model Context Protocol server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration across Azure, Microsoft 365, GitHub, and other Microsoft services. ([Read more](/details/microsoft-mcp-servers-catalog.md)) `Microsoft` `Azure` `Enterprise`
- [Terraform IaC MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - MCP server for Terraform infrastructure-as-code operations enabling AI assistants to plan, apply, and manage infrastructure through natural language. Supports approval workflows and automatic change visualization before applying configurations. ([Read more](/details/terraform-iac-mcp-server.md)) `Terraform` `Infrastructure As Code` `Automation`
- [Vercel MCP Handler](https://github.com/vercel/mcp-handler) - Official Vercel adapter for easily spinning up Model Context Protocol servers on Next.js, Nuxt, Svelte and other frameworks with optimized concurrency, dynamic scaling, and instance sharing for production deployment. ([Read more](/details/vercel-mcp-handler.md)) `Serverless` `Vercel` `Deployment`
- [AgentBay](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/agentbay) - An MCP server for providing serverless cloud infrastructure for AI agents, enabling scalable agent deployment and execution. ([Read more](/details/agentbay.md)) `Serverless` `Cloud Infrastructure` `Ai Agents`
- [Aiven](https://aiven.io/) - Navigate your Aiven projects and interact with PostgreSQL®, Apache Kafka®, ClickHouse® and OpenSearch® services. ## MCP Server Directories Lists

- [Anthropic MCP Servers Collection](https://github.com/madhukarkumar/anthropic-mcp-servers) - An open-source collection of example MCP servers (TypeScript and Python) managed by Anthropic and the Model Context Protocol community, including servers for memory, filesystem access, Git, GitHub, Postgres, and more. ([Read more](/details/anthropic-mcp-servers-collection.md))
- [Atlassian MCP Server (Rovo IDE Integration)](https://support.atlassian.com/rovo/docs/setting-up-ides/) - Atlassian’s MCP-based integration for IDEs, used by Rovo to connect tools like Jira, Confluence, and other Atlassian products to AI assistants. The Atlassian CLI MCP server can be registered in environments like Warp so models can query and act on Atlassian project data from within the editor. ([Read more](/details/atlassian-mcp-server-rovo-ide-integration.md))
- [Awesome MCP Servers (appcypher)](https://github.com/appcypher/awesome-mcp-servers) - A curated awesome list of Model Context Protocol servers compiled by Stephen Akinyemi (appcypher). ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-servers-appcypher.md))
- [Awesome Remote MCP Servers](https://github.com/jaw9c/awesome-remote-mcp-servers) - A curated GitHub repository listing remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, including categories, authentication details, and usage examples for integrating MCP servers with LLM clients. It serves as a central directory for discovering and contributing OAuth 2.0–enabled remote MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/awesome-remote-mcp-servers.md)) `Curated List` `Directory` `Mcp`
- [AWS KB Retrieval](https://github.com/madhukarkumar/anthropic-mcp-servers/blob/main/src/aws-kb-retrieval-server) - An MCP server that retrieves content from AWS Knowledge Bases using the Amazon Bedrock Agent Runtime, enabling LLMs to query AWS-hosted knowledge resources. ([Read more](/details/aws-kb-retrieval.md))
- [AWS S3 MCP Server](https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-mcp-server-s3) - A sample Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AWS S3 that allows LLMs to flexibly fetch objects from S3 buckets, such as PDF documents, for retrieval and processing. ([Read more](/details/aws-s3-mcp-server.md))
- [BigQuery MCP Server (LucasHild)](https://github.com/LucasHild/mcp-server-bigquery) - An MCP server for Google BigQuery that allows LLMs to inspect database schemas and execute SQL queries directly against BigQuery datasets. ([Read more](/details/bigquery-mcp-server-lucashild.md))
- [Brave Search](https://github.com/madhukarkumar/anthropic-mcp-servers/blob/main/src/brave-search) - An MCP server providing web and local search via the Brave Search API, allowing LLMs to perform privacy-focused internet queries. ([Read more](/details/brave-search.md))
- [Chroma](https://github.com/privetin/chroma) - An MCP-compatible vector database server for semantic document search and metadata filtering, built on top of the Chroma vector database. ([Read more](/details/chroma.md))
- [code-executor](https://github.com/bazinga012/mcp_code_executor) - An MCP server that allows LLMs to execute Python code inside a specified Conda environment, enabling safe, tool-based code execution workflows. ([Read more](/details/code-executor.md))
- [codemirror-mcp](https://github.com/marimo-team/codemirror-mcp) - codemirror-mcp is a CodeMirror extension that implements the Model Context Protocol for clients, enabling resource mentions and prompt commands within the editor. ([Read more](/details/codemirror-mcp.md))
- [cognee-mcp](https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee/tree/main/cognee-mcp) - A GraphRAG-focused MCP memory server that provides customizable data ingestion, processing, and search over graph-based knowledge representations. ([Read more](/details/cognee-mcp.md))
- [Context7 MCP Server Demo](https://docs.warp.dev/university/mcp-servers/context7-mcp-update-astro-project-with-best-practices) - An example MCP server that integrates Context7 with Warp to experiment with bringing external data and best-practice recommendations into development workflows, such as updating an Astro project via MCP tools. ([Read more](/details/context7-mcp-server-demo.md))
- [Dataset Viewer](https://github.com/privetin/dataset-viewer) - An MCP server that lets users browse and analyze Hugging Face datasets, including search, filtering, statistics, and data export capabilities. ([Read more](/details/dataset-viewer.md)) `Datasets` `Data Exploration`
- [MCPHub](https://mcphub.io) - MCPHub is a centralized directory and registry for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, allowing users to discover, install, and manage MCP servers easily. Key features include search, ratings, installation guides, and community contributions. It excels in use cases like finding specialized MCP servers for AI agents, comparing alternatives such as mcpservers.org, and provides dynamic updates with user reviews unlike static GitHub lists. ([Read more](/details/mcphub.md)) `Directory` `Registry` `Discovery`
- [Ai Agent Marketplace Index Mcp](https://github.com/ai-agent-hub/ai-agent-marketplace-index-mcp) - Provides a searchable index and marketplace of 5000+ AI agents and tools, allowing users to discover and monitor MCP servers for various tasks. ([Read more](/details/ai-agent-marketplace-index-mcp.md)) `Directory` `Ai Agent` `Mcp` `Curated List` `Marketplace`
- [Awesome Awesome MCP Servers](https://apidog.com/blog/top-10-mcp-servers/) - A curated GitHub repository listing top Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, providing direct access to a variety of MCP server implementations and resources. Highly relevant as the central directory for discovering and contributing to MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/awesome-awesome-mcp-servers.md)) `Curated List` `Directory` `Mcp` `Open Source`
- [awesome mcp projects](https://github.com/smallnest/mcp) - A GitHub repository that appears intended as a curated list of MCP (Model Context Protocol) projects and resources. The current repository primarily contains HTML and minimal visible content, suggesting it is an early-stage or placeholder list for MCP-related servers and tools rather than a fully populated directory. ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-projects.md)) `Curated List` `Directory` `Mcp`
- [Awesome MCP Servers - Data Analytics](https://github.com/PipedreamHQ/awesome-mcp-servers#data-analytics) - A curated category within the Awesome MCP Servers list focused on MCP-compatible data analytics servers and tools. This section collects Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that provide analytics-related capabilities, such as querying, transforming, and analyzing data sources via standardized MCP interfaces. ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-servers-data-analytics.md)) `Curated List` `Directory` `Data Analysis`
- [Base Free USDC Transfer MCP Server](https://github.com/magnetai/mcp-free-usdc-transfer) - An MCP server that enables LLMs to send USDC on the Base network for free using Coinbase CDP wallet infrastructure, integrating on-chain transfers into AI workflows. ([Read more](/details/base-free-usdc-transfer-mcp-server.md))
- [CFBD API MCP Server](https://github.com/lenwood/cfbd-mcp-server) - An MCP server for the College Football Data (CFBD) API that lets LLMs query structured college football statistics and related data. ([Read more](/details/cfbd-api-mcp-server.md))
- [ChatSum MCP Server](https://github.com/mcpso/mcp-server-chatsum) - An MCP server that allows LLMs to query and summarize chat messages, enabling conversational log analysis and condensation. ([Read more](/details/chatsum-mcp-server.md))
- [Chroma Package Search MCP Server](https://www.mcpnow.io/en/server/chroma-package-search-chroma-core-package-search) - A Chroma-hosted MCP server for package searching at `mcp.trychroma.com`, allowing tools to query packages through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/chroma-package-search-mcp-server.md))
- [Cloudinary](https://github.com/felores/cloudinary-mcp-server) - A Cloudinary MCP server that lets MCP clients upload media assets to Cloudinary and retrieve their URLs and metadata. ([Read more](/details/cloudinary.md))
- [coin_api_mcp](https://github.com/longmans/coin_api_mcp) - An MCP server that exposes CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency market data to MCP-compatible clients for querying prices and market information. ([Read more](/details/coin_api_mcp.md))
- [Compass](https://github.com/liuyoshio/mcp-compass) - MCP Compass is a discovery and recommendation service that helps AI assistants find and understand MCP servers using natural language queries. It's directly relevant as a tool to locate and interact with MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/compass.md)) `Mcp` `Discovery` `tool-discovery` `Ai Assistant`
- [Create Kotlin MCP Server Sample](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/kotlin-sdk/tree/main/samples/kotlin-mcp-server) - Sample Kotlin-based MCP server template included in the Kotlin SDK, demonstrating best practices and providing a starting point for building custom MCP servers in Kotlin. ([Read more](/details/create-kotlin-mcp-server-sample.md))

Enables Claude Messages API to access external tools, with TypeScript SDK helpers for seamless type conversion and OAuth support. ([Read more](/details/anthropic-claude-mcp-connector.md)) `Claude Api` `Official` `Ai Integration`

([Read more](/details/hugging-face-mcp-server.md)) `Machine Learning` `Models` `Transformers`
- [Jina AI MCP Server](https://github.com/jina-ai/MCP) - Official Jina AI remote Model Context Protocol server providing access to Jina Reader, Embeddings, and Reranker APIs with tools for URL-to-markdown conversion, web search, image search, and semantic deduplication. ([Read more](/details/jina-ai-mcp-server.md)) `Embeddings` `Search` `Ai Assistant`
- [Knowledge Graph Memory MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory) - Official Anthropic MCP server implementing persistent memory using local knowledge graph. ([Read more](/details/knowledge-graph-memory-mcp-server.md)) `Memory` `Knowledge Graph` `Persistence`

- [Jina AI Embeddings MCP Server](https://jina.ai/embeddings/) - Remote Model Context Protocol server providing access to Jina's multimodal embeddings, Reader API, and reranker capabilities. ([Read more](/details/jina-ai-embeddings-mcp-server.md)) `Embeddings` `Multimodal` `Search`

- [Lingo.dev](https://lingo.dev) - MCP server enabling AI agents to speak every language using the Lingo.dev Localization Engine, providing automated translation and localization capabilities. ([Read more](/details/lingodev.md)) `Localization` `I18n` `Translation`

## Developer Tools "Development Tools Mcp Servers"amp; IDE MCP Servers

- [ESLint MCP Server](https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/mcp) - Official ESLint Model Context Protocol server enabling AI assistants to run ESLint linting and code analysis in IDEs, assisting developers with automated code quality checks and JavaScript/TypeScript error detection. ([Read more](/details/eslint-mcp-server.md)) `Linting` `Code Analysis` `Javascript`
- [FastMCP Framework](https://gofastmcp.com/getting-started/welcome) - The fast, Pythonic framework for building MCP servers, clients, and applications with decorator-based API, transforming Python functions into MCP-compatible tools, resources, and prompts. ([Read more](/details/fastmcp-framework.md)) `Python` `Framework` `Sdk`
- [FastMCP Python Framework](https://fastmcp.me) - A rapid development framework for building MCP servers in Python with decorators instead of JSON schemas. Includes built-in MCP Server Inspector for browser-based testing and debugging, simplifying Python MCP server development. ([Read more](/details/fastmcp-python-framework.md)) `Python` `Framework` `Development`
- [GrowthBook MCP](https://github.com/growthbook/growthbook-mcp) - Tools for creating and interacting with GrowthBook feature flags and experiments. Supports home, Windows, Linux, and Apple. ([Read more](/details/growthbook-mcp.md)) `Feature Flags` `Experiments` `Multi Platform`
- [LangSmith MCP Server](https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/langsmith-mcp-server) - Official LangChain MCP server for LangSmith providing conversation history, tracing, datasets, experiments, and billing usage access with comprehensive observability for AI applications. ([Read more](/details/langsmith-mcp-server.md)) `Tracing` `Observability` `Langchain`
- [mcp-use Framework](https://github.com/mcp-use/mcp-use) - Full-stack Model Context Protocol framework for developing MCP Apps for ChatGPT/Claude and MCP Servers for AI Agents, supporting both Python and TypeScript with built-in agent capabilities and rich UI components. ([Read more](/details/mcp-use-framework.md)) `Framework` `Python` `Typescript`
- [Postman API Testing MCP Server](https://github.com/postmanlabs/postman-mcp-server) - Official Postman MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with APIs through Postman's platform. ([Read more](/details/postman-api-testing-mcp-server.md)) `Api Testing` `Postman` `Development`

- [Shopify Commerce Write MCP](https://dev.to/davide_conte_12a899361ed1/i-built-an-mcp-server-for-shopify-and-stripe-write-operations-the-gap-nobody-filled-n6) - Community-built MCP server for Shopify providing write operations including order management, refunds, and product updates. - [Shopify Customer Accounts MCP Server](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/customer-accounts-mcp) - Official Shopify MCP server enabling AI assistants to help customers with order tracking, returns, account information, and self-service operations. - [Toggl Track MCP Intelligent](https://github.com/verygoodplugins/mcp-toggl) - Feature-rich Toggl Track MCP server with intelligent caching, reporting tools, smart data hydration, and comprehensive time tracking capabilities for seamless AI-powered time management. - [WooCommerce MCP Server](https://developer.woocommerce.com/docs/features/mcp/) - WordPress plugin implementing Model Context Protocol for WooCommerce stores. ([Read more](/details/woocommerce-mcp-server.md)) `Wordpress` `E Commerce` `Online Store`
- [Zendesk Third-Party MCP Servers](https://mcp.composio.dev/zendesk) - Community and third-party Zendesk MCP server implementations available through platforms like Composio, PulseMCP, Swifteq, and Merge. - [Zoom MCP Integration](https://www.zoom.com/en/products/whats-new/) - MCP integration for Zoom enabling app developers to connect Zoom apps to remote MCP servers, build MCP-powered apps in AI Studio, and create custom agents that connect to third-party tools like Jira and Box. ([Read more](/details/zoom-mcp-integration.md)) `Zoom` `Video Conferencing` `Collaboration`

## Developer Tools "Developer Tools"amp; IDE MCP Servers

- [GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/features/copilot) - AI-powered code completion tool integrated with GitHub, providing MCP services for code hosting, CI/CD, and development workflows. Supports seamless interactions with code, pull requests, reviews, and CI tools. ([Read more](/details/github-copilot.md)) `Ai Coding` `Mcp` `Development`
- [MarkItDown MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown) - File conversion MCP server that transforms various document formats into high-quality Markdown optimized for LLM consumption. Supports Office documents, media files, web content, data formats, and more while preserving document structure. ([Read more](/details/markitdown-mcp-server.md)) `Document Conversion` `Markdown` `Microsoft`
- [Microsoft Learn Docs MCP Server](https://learn.microsoft.com/api/mcp) - Cloud-hosted MCP server providing AI assistants with real-time access to official Microsoft documentation through semantic search. It connects to the Microsoft Learn API endpoint and enables contextual search across Azure docs, .NET/C# documentation, Microsoft 365 resources, and other official Microsoft technical sources. ([Read more](/details/microsoft-learn-docs-mcp-server.md)) `Documentation` `Microsoft` `Semantic Search`
- [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io) - An open standard protocol that gives AI models a universal way to connect to external tools, data sources, and services, introduced by Anthropic in November 2024 and now governed by the Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation. ([Read more](/details/model-context-protocol-mcp.md)) `Open Standard` `Ai Integration` `Protocol`
- [Waystation AI MCP Server](https://github.com/waystation-ai/mcp) - A comprehensive MCP server hub that connects any MCP host with daily-use tools through a no-code, secure integration platform, positioning itself as the only MCP server needed. ([Read more](/details/waystation-ai-mcp-server.md)) `No Code` `Integration Hub` `Multi Tool`
- [Ashra MCP Server](https://github.com/getrupt/ashra-mcp) - A Model Context Protocol server for Ashra, providing AI assistant integration with Ashra's platform and services. ([Read more](/details/ashra-mcp-server.md)) `Ashra` `Platform` `Integration`
- [Atomic Writer MCP Server](https://github.com/vanzan01/atomic-writer-mcp) - A secure file operation MCP server that prevents data loss through atomic transactions, designed for AI integrations, collaborative editing, and critical data management scenarios. - [mcp-servers (HakanUcaar)](https://github.com/HakanUcaar/mcp-servers) - Example MCP server implementations (MCP server ornekleri / examples) demonstrating various MCP integration patterns and use cases. ([Read more](/details/mcp-servers-hakanucaar.md)) `Examples` `Patterns` `Integration`
- [MCPC](https://github.com/vlyl/mcpc) - MCP server scaffolding tool that provides boilerplate and utilities for quickly creating new MCP server projects. ([Read more](/details/mcpc.md)) `Scaffolding` `Boilerplate` `Development`
- [MCPGate](https://github.com/54rt1n/mcpgate) - A simple stdio-to-HTTP tunnel that shuttles JSON-RPC requests to SSE endpoints, bridging communication protocols for MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/mcpgate.md)) `Tunnel` `Stdio To Http` `Json Rpc`
- [mcphost](https://github.com/mark3labs/mcphost) - A CLI host application that enables Large Language Models to interact with external tools through the Model Context Protocol, providing a standardized way to integrate LLMs with MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/mcphost.md)) `Cli` `Llm Host` `Tool Integration`
- [MCPO](https://github.com/open-webui/mcpo) - A simple, secure MCP-to-OpenAPI proxy server that bridges the Model Context Protocol with OpenAPI specifications, enabling OpenAPI endpoints to be consumed as MCP tools. ([Read more](/details/mcpo.md)) `Proxy` `Openapi` `Open Webui`
- [MCPOmni Connect](https://github.com/Abiorh001/mcp_omni_connect) - A versatile CLI client designed to connect to various MCP servers using stdio transport, providing seamless integration with OpenAI models and dynamic tool/resource management across multiple servers. ([Read more](/details/mcpomni-connect.md)) `Cli Client` `Multi Server` `Openai`
- [multimodal-mcp-client](https://github.com/Ejb503/multimodal-mcp-client) - A multi-modal MCP client designed for voice-powered agentic workflows, enabling AI agents to process and interact with multiple media types through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/multimodal-mcp-client.md)) `Multimodal` `Voice` `Agentic Workflows`
- [Muumuu Domain](https://muumuu-domain.com/) - Official MCP server to find, buy, and manage domains without leaving chat. ([Read more](/details/muumuu-domain.md)) `Official` `Domains` `Domain Management`
- [Mythic MCP](https://github.com/xpn/mythic_mcp) - A simple proof-of-concept to expose Mythic (C2 framework) as an MCP server, enabling AI assistants to interact with Mythic through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/mythic-mcp.md)) `Mythic` `C2` `Security`
- [Nanoid](https://github.com/ai/nanoid) - A tiny (118 bytes), secure, URL-friendly, unique string ID generator for JavaScript, useful for MCP server ID generation. ([Read more](/details/nanoid.md)) `Javascript` `Id Generator` `Tiny` `Secure`
- [Neoforge MCP Server](https://github.com/neoforge-dev/neoforge-mcp-server) - NeoMCP server providing Model Context Protocol capabilities, designed as an extensible MCP server implementation for AI integrations. - [Nest LLM Agent (luis1232023)](https://github.com/luis1232023/nest-llm-aigent) - Converts Stdio MCP Server to RestFul, enabling easy deployment and integration with web services as an MCP gateway. ([Read more](/details/nest-llm-agent-luis1232023.md)) `Nestjs` `Restful` `Gateway`
- [Next MCP Server](https://github.com/jazelly/next-mcp-server) - MCP server that helps LLMs understand Next.js applications better, providing context about project structure, routing, and components for AI-assisted development. - [Okto MCP Server](https://github.com/okto-hq/okto-mcp-server) - MCP server using Okto v2 APIs, enabling AI assistants to interact with Okto's web3 wallet infrastructure for blockchain operations. ([Read more](/details/okto-mcp-server.md)) `Web3` `Blockchain` `Okto`
- [OpenAPI MCP Server (rahgadda)](https://github.com/rahgadda/openapi_mcp_server) - MCP server that exposes OpenAPI specifications as MCP tools, enabling AI agents to interact with REST APIs through natural language without custom wrappers. - [OpenAPI MCP Server (ReAPI)](https://github.com/ReAPI-com/mcp-openapi) - OpenAPI specification MCP server that converts OpenAPI specs into Model Context Protocol tools for AI agent integration. ([Read more](/details/openapi-mcp-server-reapi.md)) `Openapi` `Specification` `Api Integration`
- [OpenAPI-MCP (guojord)](https://github.com/guojord/OpenAPI-MCP) - OpenAPI-MCP proxy translates OpenAPI specifications into MCP tools, enabling AI agents to access external APIs without custom wrapper code. ([Read more](/details/openapi-mcp-guojord.md)) `Openapi` `Proxy` `Api Integration`
- [OpenRPC MCP Server](https://github.com/shanejonas/openrpc-mpc-server) - A Model Context Protocol server that exposes JSON-RPC functionality through OpenRPC specifications, enabling MCP clients to discover, understand, and invoke JSON-RPC services. - [package-documentation-mcp](https://github.com/package-docs/mcp-server) - MCP Server to retrieve documentation for a package. It enables AI agents to fetch and query package documentation dynamically. ([Read more](/details/package-documentation-mcp.md)) `Documentation` `Package Manager` `Search`
- [Pica MCP](https://github.com/picahq/pica-mcp) - A Model Context Protocol Server for Pica, built in TypeScript, providing API integration capabilities for the Pica platform. ([Read more](/details/pica-mcp.md)) `Typescript` `Pica` `Api Integration`
- [Rails MCP Server](https://github.com/maquina-app/rails-mcp-server) - A Ruby gem implementing a Model Context Protocol server for Rails projects, allowing LLMs to interact with Rails applications through MCP tools. ([Read more](/details/rails-mcp-server.md)) `Ruby` `Rails` `Gem`

- [Remote MCP](https://github.com/ssut/Remote-MCP) - A type-safe solution to remote MCP communication, enabling effortless integration for centralized management of Model Context Protocol servers. ([Read more](/details/remote-mcp.md)) `Remote Access` `Type Safe` `Centralized Management`
- [riza-io/mcp-go](https://github.com/riza-io/mcp-go) - A Go library for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling Go developers to easily create MCP-compliant servers that connect LLMs to external tools and data. - [teamretro-mcp-server](https://github.com/teamretro/teamretro-mcp-server) - Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for TeamRetro integration. Enables AI to interact with TeamRetro for developer tools and communication. ([Read more](/details/teamretro-mcp-server.md)) `Communication` `Team Retro`
- [Toolhouse MCP](https://github.com/SecretiveShell/MCP-toolhouse) - A Model Context Protocol server that provides access to tools from the Toolhouse platform, giving AI assistants a curated set of pre-built tools for various tasks through a unified interface. - [Translate Server](https://github.com/vlinr/translate-server) - A simple translation MCP Server that can translate single files or entire directories. - [Ubie OSS MCP Proxy](https://github.com/ubie-oss/mcp-proxy) - A thin MCP proxy that sits between MCP clients and servers, providing lightweight protocol translation and routing capabilities. ([Read more](/details/ubie-oss-mcp-proxy.md)) `Proxy` `Lightweight` `Routing`

- [WorkOS AuthKit MCP](https://workos.com/docs/mcp) - A spec-compliant OAuth 2.1 authorization server for MCP that provides SSO-integrated access, scoped tokens, PKCE, consent flows, and client registration (supporting both CIMD and DCR) for enterprise MCP server deployments. ([Read more](/details/workos-authkit-mcp.md)) `Oauth` `Enterprise Auth` `Mcp`

## MCP Directories & Marketplaces

- [awesome-mcp-list](https://github.com/MobinX/awesome-mcp-list) - Curated GitHub repository serving as MCP server directory with categorized lists and GitHub search integration. Supports filtering by function like browser automation or art tools for AI agent discovery. MCP-focused list offering better specificity than broad GitHub awesome lists. ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-list.md)) `Directory` `Awesome List` `Discovery`
- [Best of MCP Servers](https://github.com/tolkonepiu/best-of-mcp-servers) - Curated collection of top MCP servers on GitHub with quality filtering and leaderboards. Features community voting, category browsing, and search for agent tool discovery. Superior curated selection compared to general GitHub awesome lists for MCP server exploration. ([Read more](/details/best-of-mcp-servers.md)) `Directory` `Leaderboard` `Marketplace`
- [Docker MCP Registry Official](https://github.com/docker/mcp-registry) - Official Docker Hub directory for containerized MCP servers, supporting search, ratings, stats, and one-click pulls for agent deployment. Features security scans and leaderboards by downloads. Container-focused registry ideal for scalable MCP discovery vs source-only GitHub lists. ([Read more](/details/docker-mcp-registry-official.md)) `Directory` `Registry` `Leaderboard`
- [Glama MCP Registry](https://glama.ai/mcp/servers) - Largest MCP server marketplace and registry with over 19,000 servers, featuring search, filtering by category/language, usage leaderboards, and daily updates. Essential for discovering production-ready MCP servers for AI agents. Comprehensive scale and analytics surpass static GitHub awesome lists. ([Read more](/details/glama-mcp-registry.md)) `Directory` `Marketplace` `Leaderboard`
- [MCP Registry](https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/) - Official central directory for Model Context Protocol servers with standardized API endpoints for production, staging, and local discovery. Provides reliable base URLs without advanced search but serves as the authoritative hub for MCP ecosystem navigation. Canonical registry outperforming community GitHub lists with protocol-official governance. ([Read more](/details/mcp-registry.md)) `Directory` `Registry` `Official`

Features community updates, examples for embedded devices/robots. MCP-specific hardware registry vs npm's software packages. Features deployment templates. Azure MCP registry vs npm. ([Read more](/details/azure-mcp-hub.md)) `Registry` `Discovery` `Awesome List`
- [Glama MCP Server Directory](https://glama.ai) - Automated MCP server discovery tool using introspection for tools/prompts/configs, with search, vulnerability scans, leaderboards for agent tool discovery. Features dynamic filtering, security checks. MCP-specific registry vs npm. ([Read more](/details/glama-mcp-server-directory.md)) `Registry` `Discovery` `Awesome List`
- [MCP Servers](https://mcpservers.org/) - Curated GitHub list of MCP servers with categories, stars, and links; ideal for discovering tools vs scattered blogs. ([Read more](/details/mcpservers-org.md)) `Awesome List` `Curated` `Discovery`
- [Portkey MCP Servers](https://portkey.ai/mcp-servers) - Online MCP server discovery tool with search/filter by category, integration guides for agent tools. Features dynamic updates. Comprehensive MCP registry vs npm. ([Read more](/details/portkey-mcp-servers.md)) `Registry` `Discovery` `Awesome List`
- [All About AI MCP Servers](https://github.com/AllAboutAI-YT/all-about-ai-mcp-servers) - All About AI MCP Servers collection - a curated set of Model Context Protocol servers covering various AI-related tools and integrations. ([Read more](/details/all-about-ai-mcp-servers.md)) `Collection` `Curated` `Ai Tools`
- [guMCP](https://gumloop.com/gumcp) - guMCP by Gumloop provides free, open-source, fully hosted MCP servers for seamless integration with any AI app. ([Read more](/details/gumcp.md)) `Open Source` `Hosted` `Free`
- [MCP Server Discovery Desktop App](https://github.com/Jeamee/mcp-server-discovery) - Desktop MCP server discovery tool with visual browsing, search/filter, one-click install for agent tools. Features management dashboard. Interactive MCP registry vs npm CLI. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-discovery-desktop-app.md)) `Registry` `Discovery` `Awesome List`

## Monitoring

- [Datadog MCP Server Comprehensive](https://github.com/shelfio/datadog-mcp) - Comprehensive Datadog Model Context Protocol server providing AI assistants with access to unified observability data including metrics, logs, APM traces, RUM, monitors, dashboards, and specialized toolsets for error tracking and feature flags. ([Read more](/details/opentelemetry-unified-mcp-server.md)) `Opentelemetry` `Tracing` `Distributed Systems`
- [Sentry Error Monitoring MCP](https://docs.sentry.io/product/sentry-mcp/) - Official remote Model Context Protocol server connecting LLM clients to Sentry's error monitoring and crash reporting platform. ([Read more](/details/sentry-error-monitoring-mcp.md)) `Error Monitoring` `Crash Reporting` `Debugging`
- [Splunk MCP Server](https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/artificial-intelligence/unlock-the-power-of-splunk-cloud-platform-with-the-mcp-server.html) - Enterprise log management and analytics server that bridges Splunk Cloud Platform with AI systems, enabling secure execution of SPL queries, report generation, and AI-driven operational insights with RBAC and enterprise authentication. ## Cloud Storage

- [Box](https://developer.box.com/guides/authentication/mcp/) - Box MCP Server allows third party AI agents from platforms like Copilot Studio, Cursor, Claude for Desktop to access Box content seamlessly. It extends the agent's capabilities by allowing it to perform actions related to content stored in Box. Official protocol implementation. ([Read more](/details/box.md)) `Official` `Box` `Cloud Storage`
- [Box MCP Server](https://developer.box.com/guides/ai-agents/mcp/) - Box MCP Server allows third party AI agents from platforms like Copilot Studio, Cursor, Claude for Desktop to access Box content seamlessly. It extends the agent's capabilities by allowing it to perform actions related to content stored in Box. Official protocol implementation marked with ⭐. ([Read more](/details/box-mcp-server.md)) `Official` `Enterprise` `File Access`
- [VideoDB](https://github.com/videodb-io/videodb-mcp-server) - A serverless video database to easily store, index, search, and stream videos. VideoDB uses AI to automatically tag scenes, generate accurate transcriptions, and quickly retrieve video moments with simple queries. Official implementation. ([Read more](/details/videodb.md)) `Official` `Video` `Ai Tagging`
- [Google Drive](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/google-drive) - Google Drive integration for file access, search, and management. Enables AI models to interact with Google Drive content via MCP. ([Read more](/details/google-drive.md)) `Google Drive` `Cloud Storage` `File Management`
- [Microsoft 365](https://github.com/microsoft/m365-mcp-server) - MCP server that connects to the whole Microsoft 365 suite (Microsoft Office, Outlook, etc.) using Graph API (including mail, files, Excel, calendar). ([Read more](/details/microsoft-365.md)) `Microsoft` `Office365` `Graph Api`

## MCP Directories & Registries

- [AiMCP](https://www.aimcp.info) - AiMCP is a web directory cataloging MCP clients and servers, enabling developers to discover, compare, and select appropriate Model Context Protocol tools. Features include a gallery view, filtering by tags/properties, featured highlights, and coverage of 50+ integrations across IDEs, productivity tools, and domain-specific servers. Use cases include MCP tool discovery; it offers a visual, filterable interface superior to plain GitHub awesome lists for quick comparisons. ([Read more](/details/aimcp.md)) `Directory` `Curated List` `Gallery` `Mcp`
- [Awesome MCP Servers (punkpeye)](https://github.com/punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers) - Curated GitHub list of MCP servers with categories, stars, and links; ideal for discovering tools vs scattered blogs. ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-servers-punkpeye.md)) `Awesome List` `Curated` `Discovery`
- [Awesome MCP Servers (wong2)](https://github.com/wong2/awesome-mcp-servers) - Curated GitHub list of MCP servers with categories, stars, and links; ideal for discovering tools vs scattered blogs. ([Read more](/details/awesome-mcp-servers-wong2.md)) `Awesome List` `Curated` `Discovery`

## Mcp Middleware & Orchestration

- [Context7 Memory Manager](https://fastmcp.me) - The most popular MCP server in 2026 with 11,000 views and 690 installs on FastMCP. Provides advanced memory management capabilities for AI agents, capturing nearly 2x the views of the #2 server in the Memory Management category. ([Read more](/details/context7-memory-manager.md)) `Memory Management` `Context` `Popular`
- [Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation](https://www.linuxfoundation.org/press/agentic-ai-foundation) - Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF) governance structure for Model Context Protocol under the Linux Foundation. Founded by Anthropic, Block, and OpenAI in December 2025 to ensure open, standardized AI agent communication. ([Read more](/details/linux-foundation-agentic-ai-foundation.md)) `Governance` `Standards` `Foundation`
- [Magg Meta MCP Server](https://github.com/magg-ai/magg-mcp) - Universal meta-MCP server acting as a hub for discovering, installing, and orchestrating multiple MCP servers, allowing LLMs to autonomously manage and coordinate distributed MCP server infrastructure. ([Read more](/details/magg-meta-mcp-server.md)) `Orchestration` `Automation` `Meta Server`
- [1mcpserver](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/1mcpserver) - MCP of MCPs that automatically discovers, configures, and adds MCP servers on your local machine. Acts as a meta-server for managing other MCP server installations. ([Read more](/details/1mcpserver.md)) `Meta Server` `Auto Discovery` `Local Management`
- [A2A MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/a2a-mcp-server) - An MCP server that bridges the Model Context Protocol (MCP) with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol, enabling MCP-compatible AI assistants like Claude to seamlessly interact with A2A agents. ([Read more](/details/a2a-mcp-server.md)) `Agent To Agent` `Protocol Bridge` `Interoperability`
- [Agentic Framework](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/agentic-framework) - Multi-agent collaboration framework enabling AI agents to register, discover each other, exchange asynchronous messages via HTTP transport, and work together on complex tasks with persistent message history. ([Read more](/details/agentic-framework.md)) `Multi Agent` `Collaboration` `Async Messaging`
- [AllInOneMCP](https://mcp.pfvc.io/mcp/) - A central hub for MCP servers that helps discover available MCP servers and learn how to install and use them. Acts as an MCP of MCPs for centralized server management. ([Read more](/details/allinonemcp.md)) `Discovery` `Hub` `Remote`
- [Archestra.AI](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/archestra-ai) - Open-source enterprise-ready MCP gateway, registry, orchestrator, credentials management, LLM cost management and chat platform for AI agent infrastructure. ([Read more](/details/archestraai.md)) `Gateway` `Orchestrator` `Llm Cost Management`
- [BreakoutRoom](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/breakoutroom) - Agents accomplishing goals together in peer-to-peer rooms, enabling collaborative multi-agent task execution and coordination. ([Read more](/details/breakoutroom.md)) `Multi Agent` `P2p` `Collaboration`

- [C++ MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/cplusplus-mcp) - Semantic C++ code analysis using libclang. - [Claude Context Scoring (claude-faf-mcp)](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/claude-faf-mcp) - MCP server for .faf format. - [Context Crystallizer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/context-crystallizer) - AI Context Engineering tool that transforms large repositories into crystallized, AI-consumable knowledge through systematic analysis and optimization. ## Security & Attestation Mcp Servers

- [HashiCorp Vault MCP Server](https://developer.hashicorp.com/vault/docs/mcp-server/overview) - Official secrets management server that integrates with HashiCorp Vault, enabling AI models to list, create, delete mounts and manage KV secrets securely through natural language. - [mcp-scan Security Tool](https://owasp.org/www-project-mcp-top-10/) - Comprehensive MCP server security scanner that detects vulnerabilities, pins tool definitions, monitors for changes, and provides continuous security monitoring through proxy mode. ([Read more](/details/mcp-scan-security-tool.md)) `Security` `Vulnerability Scanning` `Monitoring`
- [Model Safety PyTorch TensorFlow MCP](https://glama.ai/mcp/servers/itsalissonsilva/ModelSafetyMCP) - Security-focused MCP server for scanning ML model artifacts including PyTorch and TensorFlow checkpoints for unsafe serialization, malicious patterns, and deserialization-based security threats. ([Read more](/details/model-safety-pytorch-tensorflow-mcp.md)) `Ml Security` `Pytorch` `Tensorflow`
- [Asgardeo](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/asgardeo) - MCP server to interact with your Asgardeo organization through LLM tools. - [Attestable MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/attestable-mcp) - An MCP server running inside a trusted execution environment (TEE) via Gramine, showcasing remote attestation using RA-TLS. - [Auth0](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/auth0) - MCP server for interacting with your Auth0 tenant, supporting creating and modifying actions, applications, forms, logs, resource servers, and more. - [Authenticator App 2FA](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/authenticator-app) - A secure MCP server that enables AI agents to interact with the Authenticator App for two-factor authentication management, providing tools for managing and generating 2FA codes. - [AWS Cognito MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/aws-cognito-mcp) - An MCP server that connects to AWS Cognito for authentication and user management, enabling AI assistants to manage identity and access. - [BoostSecurity](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/boostsecurity) - Powered by BoostSecurity, the MCP guardrails coding agents against introducing dependencies with vulnerabilities, malware or typosquatting. - [Cryptography E2E MCP](https://github.com/anton10xr/mcp-cryptography) - Tiny MCP server with cryptography tools, sufficient to establish end-to-end encryption between LLM agents, enabling secure inter-agent communication. ## AI Agent & Orchestration MCP Servers

- [n8n Workflow Automation MCP](https://n8n.io/workflows/3569-build-an-mcp-server-with-google-calendar/) - Visual MCP server for multi-agent orchestration using n8n's 400+ nodes. Supports tool calling, workflow chaining, and task delegation across integrations. MCP-native visual agents outperform LangChain in no-code flexibility. ([Read more](/details/n8n-workflow-automation-mcp.md)) `Multi Agent` `Orchestration` `Agentic` `N8n` `No Code`
- [Strands Agents MCP Server](https://github.com/strands-agents/mcp-server) - MCP server for building long-running multi-agent systems with persistent state, tool calling, and async orchestration. Supports context messaging and task delegation across sessions. Ideal for agent workflows in enterprise automation; MCP-native vs LangChain for reliable execution. ([Read more](/details/strands-agents-mcp-server.md)) `Multi Agent` `Orchestration` `Agentic` `Long Running Tasks` `Aws`

## API Integration & Gateway MCP Servers

- [Agoda APIAgent](https://github.com/agoda-com/api-agent) - Universal MCP proxy/gateway converting any REST/GraphQL API to MCP server for OpenAI/Claude access, with zero code/deployments via schema introspection and DuckDB SQL processing. Includes auth proxy, rate limiting features. Enables unified agent API calls; standardizes protocol vs direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/agoda-apiagent.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`
- [Apollo GraphQL MCP Server](https://www.apollographql.com/docs/apollo-mcp-server) - Official MCP proxy/gateway for Apollo GraphQL APIs, enabling OpenAI/Claude natural language queries via MCP tools from schema. Features auth proxy, rate limiting. Unified GraphQL calls for agents; protocol standardization vs direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/apollo-graphql-mcp-server.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`
- [AccuWeather Forecast MCP](https://github.com/TimLukaHorstmann/mcp-weather) - MCP proxy/gateway for AccuWeather API enabling OpenAI/Claude models to access hourly and daily weather forecasts via standardized MCP protocol. Features authentication proxy and rate limiting for secure, reliable access. Supports unified agent API calls for weather data; provides protocol standardization versus direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/accuweather-forecast-mcp.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`
- [ActionKit by Paragon](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/actionkit) - MCP proxy/gateway for Paragon's ActionKit API, connecting OpenAI/Claude to 130+ SaaS integrations like Slack and Salesforce via MCP. Features auth proxy and rate limiting. Enables unified agent API calls across SaaS platforms with protocol standardization over direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/actionkit-by-paragon.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`
- [Amazon Fresh MCP Server](https://github.com/Alec2435/amazon-fresh-mcp) - MCP proxy/gateway for Amazon Fresh grocery API, allowing OpenAI/Claude to browse products, manage lists, place orders via MCP. Features auth proxy, rate limiting. Unified agent calls for e-commerce; protocol standardization over direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/amazon-fresh-mcp-server.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`
- [APIAgent - Universal API to MCP Converter](https://github.com/agoda-com/apiagent) - MCP gateway converting REST/GraphQL APIs to MCP for OpenAI/Claude, zero code/deploy via introspection. Auth proxy, rate limiting included. Unified agent API access; standardizes vs SDKs. ([Read more](/details/apiagent-universal-api-to-mcp-converter.md)) `API Proxy` `OpenAI Compatible` `Tool Calling`

## Cloud & DevOps MCP Servers

- [AWS Official MCP Servers](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp) - Collection of official MCP servers from AWS Labs allowing AI agents to interact with core services like S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, ECS, and CloudWatch for cloud resource management. Supports IAM/STS authentication, multi-region operations, and comprehensive API coverage for compute, storage, and monitoring. Enables DevOps automation in agent workflows, offering conversational access unlike Terraform's declarative IaC. ([Read more](/details/aws-official-mcp-servers.md)) `Aws` `Cloud` `Infrastructure`
- [Azure DevOps MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-devops-mcp) - Microsoft's official MCP server for Azure DevOps enables AI agents to manage work items, pipelines, repos, and builds via natural language. Features PAT/OAuth auth, full CI/CD integration, test plans, and security scanning. Supports DevOps agent automation for project management, conversational alternative to REST APIs or Terraform for app lifecycle. ([Read more](/details/azure-devops-mcp-server.md)) `Azure` `Devops` `Ci Cd`
- [Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio MCP for Spark Upgrade](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/mcp/servers/sagemaker-unified-studio-spark-upgrade-mcp-server) - MCP server in SageMaker Unified Studio for AI agents to automate Apache Spark upgrades and migrations to AWS Glue/EMR services. Offers code refactoring, compatibility testing, cluster modernization with AWS-native integrations and auto-provisioning. Supports DevOps agent workflows for data engineering, more specialized for Spark than Terraform's general IaC. ([Read more](/details/amazon-sagemaker-unified-studio-mcp-for-spark-upgrade.md)) `Aws` `Spark` `Data Processing`
- [Argo CD MCP Server](https://argoproj.github.io/cd/) - MCP interface for AI agents to manage GitOps continuous delivery in Argo CD, handling app syncs, rollbacks, health checks across clusters. Includes API wrapping for deployments, status monitoring, multi-cluster support. Ideal for DevOps automation in K8s environments, focused on CD unlike Terraform's provisioning. ([Read more](/details/argo-cd-mcp-server.md)) `Kubernetes` `Gitops` `Cd`
- [AWS MCP Server](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp) - Official reference implementation for AWS. Exposes AWS SDK capabilities for resource inspection and management via chat interface. Supports Docker and remote deployment. ([Read more](/details/aws-mcp-server.md)) `Docker` `Remote` `Aws` `Cloud`
- [Azure MCP Server](https://github.com/Azure/azure-mcp-server) - Official Microsoft implementation for Azure resource management. Enables interaction with Azure Resource Manager (ARM) to audit and modify resources. ([Read more](/details/azure-mcp-server.md)) `Docker` `Remote` `Azure` `Microsoft`
- [CloudBees MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/cloudbees) - CloudBees MCP server bridging software delivery platform APIs for AI agents in CI/CD and DevOps. Features platform auth, pipeline governance support. Use cases: AI automation in enterprise DevOps workflows, integrated alternative to SDKs. ([Read more](/details/cloudbees-mcp-server.md)) `Cloud` `Devops` `Cicd`
- [Cloudflare Agents MCP Server](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents) - Allows agents to interact with Cloudflare Workers, KV, and DNS settings. Ideal for checking deployment statuses or clearing caches. ([Read more](/details/cloudflare-agents-mcp-server.md)) `Remote` `Cloudflare`
- [Cloudflare MCP Servers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents) - Cloudflare MCP servers bridging APIs for AI agents to manage Workers, KV, DNS, cache. Features API token auth, remote operations across edge network. Use cases: AI cloud infra mgmt without dashboard, simpler than direct SDKs for agent-driven tasks. ([Read more](/details/cloudflare-mcp-servers.md)) `Cloud` `Devops` `Edge`
- [Docker Helm MCP Server](https://github.com/zekker6/mcp-helm) - Docker Helm MCP Server enables Infrastructure as Code (IaC) via MCP for Kubernetes application deployments using Helm charts. It provides secure authentication for repositories, chart operations (install/upgrade/list), release management, and real-time ops via SSE, with OCI registry support. Ideal for agentic DevOps workflows automating deployments and management conversationally, unlike verbose CLI tools requiring scripting and manual auth. ([Read more](/details/docker-helm-mcp-server.md)) `Helm` `Kubernetes` `IaC` `Kubernetes`
- [Google Cloud MCP Server](https://github.com/googleapis/gcloud-mcp) - Provides agentic access to Google Cloud resources such as compute instances, storage buckets, and IAM roles via natural language. ([Read more](/details/google-cloud-mcp-server.md)) `Local` `Google Cloud` `Gcp`
- [Helm Chart Analyzer MCP](https://github.com/V3RO/helm-chart-mcp) - Helm Chart Analyzer MCP server facilitates IaC validation and optimization via MCP for Kubernetes Helm charts. - [K8s MCP Server Toolkit](https://github.com/alexei-led/k8s-mcp-server) - K8s MCP Server Toolkit offers comprehensive IaC and operational management via MCP, integrating kubectl, Helm, Istio, and ArgoCD for Kubernetes clusters across EKS, GKE, AKS. Includes cloud-native authentication, multi-cluster switching, sandboxed execution, and audit logging for safe ops. Enables agentic DevOps for deployments, troubleshooting, and GitOps workflows through natural language, reducing CLI tool complexity and manual context switching. ([Read more](/details/k8s-mcp-server-toolkit.md)) `Kubernetes` `Helm` `Devops` `IaC` `Kubernetes`

## Developer Tools

- [PrefectHQ FastMCP](https://github.com/PrefectHQ/fastmcp) - High-level Python framework for building MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/prefecthq-fastmcp.md)) `Framework` `Python` `Open Source`
- [Tyk API-to-AI](https://tyk.io/api-to-ai/) - Tyk API-to-AI converts APIs into AI-agent interactable MCP resources through Tyk's API management platform. Features include governance, observability, rate limiting, access control, and monitoring for enterprise deployments. Ideal for bridging traditional APIs with AI workflows in production settings. ([Read more](/details/tyk-api-to-ai.md)) `Tyk` `Api Management` `Mcp`
- [AI-Create](https://github.com/xxlv-ai/ai-create) - Go-based CLI tool by XXLV for converting OpenAPI definitions to MCP servers with inspector for debugging and Claude integration. Customizable with flags for OAS path and version. Suited for debugging MCPs and Claude developers, static, auth support. ([Read more](/details/ai-create.md)) `Cli` `Static` `Claude`
- [Chrome DevTools](https://github.com/chromedevtools/devtools-mcp) - Use Chrome DevTools for website test speed, debugging, and performance analysis. Essential Chrome developer tools for MCP. ([Read more](/details/chrome-devtools.md)) `Debugging` `Performance` `Developer Tools`
- [Figma Context MCP](https://github.com/GLips/Figma-Context-MCP) - MCP server to provide Figma layout information to AI coding agents like Cursor in local TypeScript environments. ([Read more](/details/figma-context-mcp.md)) `Local` `Typescript`
- [Flutter Development](https://mcp.directory/flutter-development) - MCP server for building beautiful cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter and Dart. Covers widgets, state management using Provider or BLoC, navigation, API integration, and Material Design principles. ([Read more](/details/flutter-development.md)) `Flutter` `Dart` `Mobile Development`
- [MCP Discovery](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/discovery) - MCP Discovery is a lightweight Rust-based CLI service for decentralized discovery and registration of MCP servers, allowing AI agents to dynamically find available tools and resources. It introspects server capabilities without relying on central registries, promoting a distributed ecosystem. Unlike centralized registries, it enables peer-to-peer agent tool discovery for more resilient operations. ([Read more](/details/mcp-discovery.md)) `Discovery` `Registry` `Cli` `Rust`
- [MCPGen](https://github.com/lyeslab/mcpgen) - Go CLI tool by Lyeslab for single-command creation of fully functional MCP servers. Quick operational server generation. Static, no auth. ([Read more](/details/mcpgen.md)) `Cli` `Static` `Single Command`
- [openapi-mcp-generator](https://github.com/speakeasy-api/openapi-mcp-generator) - TypeScript CLI tool converting OpenAPI specs to MCP servers with auth, proxy, auto Zod schemas, and typed server generation. Robust for TypeScript users. Static, auth support. ([Read more](/details/openapi-mcp-generator.md)) `Cli` `Static` `Typescript` `Oauth2`
- [sbb-mcp-server](https://github.com/ralf-boltshauser/sbb-mcp-server) - A TypeScript starter project for building MCP servers with an echo server implementation, supporting both STDIO and SSE communication modes. Ideal for developers starting with MCP server development. ([Read more](/details/sbb-mcp-server.md)) `Typescript` `Starter` `Echo Server`
- [Zuplo](https://zuplo.com) - Popular API gateway with MCP features including OpenAPI to MCP conversion and native MCP development for compatible AI tools and agents. ([Read more](/details/zuplo.md)) `Api Gateway` `Mcp Native`

## DevOps

- [GitHub Official MCP Server](https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server) - The official GitHub MCP Server providing seamless integration with GitHub's entire ecosystem, including GitHub Actions management, pull request workflows, issue tracking, security scanning, notifications, and repository administration through natural language commands. ([Read more](/details/github-official-mcp-server.md)) `Github` `Ci Cd` `Repository Management`
- [mcp-konnect](https://github.com/Kong/mcp-konnect) - A Model Context Protocol server for interacting with Kong Konnect APIs, allowing AI assistants to query and analyze Kong Gateway configurations, traffic, and analytics through natural language. ([Read more](/details/mcp-konnect.md)) `Api Gateway` `Kong` `Traffic Analytics`
- [aaPanel MCP Server](https://github.com/aaPanel/mcp-server) - An MCP Server for aaPanel, enabling AI assistants to manage aaPanel hosting control features through natural language commands. ([Read more](/details/aapanel-mcp-server.md)) `Aapanel` `Hosting` `Control Panel`
- [AWS IaC MCP Server](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp/tree/main/src/iac-mcp-server) - Complete Infrastructure as Code toolkit with CloudFormation documentation access, CDK best practices guidance, construct examples, security validation, and deployment troubleshooting. Supports IaC workflows for AWS infrastructure. ([Read more](/details/aws-iac-mcp-server.md)) `Open Source` `Aws` `Infrastructure As Code`
- [Azure-DevOps](https://github.com/AzureDevOpsAPI/Azure-DevOps) - AI-driven interactions with Azure DevOps APIs for project management and DevOps workflows via natural language. ([Read more](/details/azure-devops.md)) `Azure Devops` `Ci Cd` `Project Management`
- [Firefly MCP](https://github.com/gofireflyio/firefly-mcp) - Firefly MCP server enabling AI assistants to interact with Firefly's cloud infrastructure management platform for resource provisioning and monitoring. ([Read more](/details/firefly-mcp.md)) `Firefly` `Cloud Management` `Infrastructure`
- [Heimdall](https://github.com/shinzo-labs/heimdall) - Guard your autonomous agents from misbehaving with the MCP Guardian proxy. A security-focused proxy that monitors and controls MCP interactions to ensure safe AI agent behavior. ([Read more](/details/heimdall.md)) `Security` `Guardian` `Proxy`
- [JFrog](https://jfrog.com/) - DevOps solution providing MCP integration within its supply chain ecosystem, enabling easy connections for agents already in the JFrog environment. ([Read more](/details/jfrog.md)) `Devops` `Mcp` `Supply Chain`
- [KAI (basebandit)](https://github.com/basebandit/kai) - An MCP Server for Kubernetes, providing cluster management and workload operations through natural language interactions. ([Read more](/details/kai-basebandit.md)) `Kubernetes` `Cluster Management` `Devops`
- [Koppla](https://github.com/ruudmens/Koppla) - A Model-Context-Protocol server for Active Directory, enabling AI assistants to manage and query Active Directory services through natural language. ([Read more](/details/koppla.md)) `Active Directory` `Identity Management` `Infrastructure`
- [MCP 1Panel](https://github.com/1Panel-dev/mcp-1panel) - Model Context Protocol server implementation for 1Panel, enabling AI assistants to manage server panels, websites, and hosting environments through natural language. ([Read more](/details/mcp-1panel.md)) `1panel` `Server Management` `Hosting`
- [MCP BT Panel](https://github.com/aaPanel/mcp_btpanel) - MCP protocol-based API tool for the Baota (BT) Panel, enabling interaction with the Baota hosting panel API through the MCP protocol. ([Read more](/details/mcp-bt-panel.md)) `Baota` `Bt Panel` `Hosting`
- [MCP k8s-eye](https://github.com/wenhuwang/mcp-k8s-eye) - MCP Server for Kubernetes management and workload status analysis, enabling AI assistants to monitor, diagnose, and manage k8s clusters through natural language. ([Read more](/details/mcp-k8s-eye.md)) `Kubernetes` `Monitoring` `Cluster Management`
- [MCP Server DanchoiCloud](https://github.com/hoangndst/mcp-server-danchoicloud) - MCP Server integration with DanchoiCloud services, enabling AI assistants to interact with cloud resources and management tools. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-danchoicloud.md)) `Cloud` `Danchoi` `Management`
- [mcp-server-docker](https://github.com/ckreiling/mcp-server-docker) - MCP server for Docker that enables AI assistants to manage Docker containers, images, volumes, and networks through natural language interactions. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-docker.md)) `Docker` `Containers` `Container Management`
- [Modal MCP Server](https://github.com/smehmood/modal-mcp-server) - MCP Server for managing Modal applications, enabling AI assistants to deploy, configure, and monitor serverless cloud workloads through the Modal platform. ([Read more](/details/modal-mcp-server.md)) `Modal` `Serverless` `Cloud Deployment`
- [Model Context Protocol Veeam](https://github.com/jorgedlcruz/modelcontextprotocol_veeam) - A collection of MCP Servers for Veeam backup and recovery solutions, enabling AI assistants to interact with Veeam infrastructure for backup management and monitoring. ([Read more](/details/model-context-protocol-veeam.md)) `Veeam` `Backup` `Infrastructure`
- [Netlify MCP Server](https://www.netlify.com/devdocs/mcp/) - MCP server for JAMstack deployment on Netlify, handling site deployment, project management, and CLI integration. ([Read more](/details/netlify-mcp-server.md)) `Official` `Netlify` `Jamstack`
- [ONOS MCP Server](https://github.com/davidlin2k/onos-mcp-server) - Model Context Protocol server implementation that provides network control and management capabilities through the ONOS SDN controller. ([Read more](/details/onos-mcp-server.md)) `Sdn` `Onos` `Networking`
- [Pinner MCP](https://github.com/safedep/pinner-mcp) - Model Context Protocol server to pin components to their immutable versions, enabling AI assistants to manage dependency versioning and artifact pinning. ([Read more](/details/pinner-mcp.md)) `Dependency Management` `Versioning` `Security`
- [POX MCP Server](https://github.com/davidlin2k/pox-mcp-server) - A Model Context Protocol server for the POX SDN controller, enabling AI assistants to manage software-defined networking through natural language. ([Read more](/details/pox-mcp-server.md)) `Sdn` `Networking` `Pox`
- [Python Docker MCP (misanthropic-ai)](https://github.com/misanthropic-ai/python-docker-mcp) - A Docker-themed MCP server that provides Docker management capabilities to AI assistants, enabling container operations through natural language. ([Read more](/details/python-docker-mcp-misanthropic-ai.md)) `Docker` `Python` `Containers`
- [Red Hat RHEL MCP Server](https://developers.redhat.com/blog/2026/04/15/red-hat-mcp-server) - Official Red Hat MCP server providing read-only operating system-level intelligence for RHEL systems. Enables AI-driven root cause analysis and system troubleshooting by exposing CPU, memory, process, and log data to LLMs through natural language conversation. ([Read more](/details/red-hat-rhel-mcp-server.md)) `Operating System` `Troubleshooting` `Read Only`
- [RocketMQ MCP](https://github.com/francisoliverlee/rocketmq-mcp) - MCP Server for Apache RocketMQ, enabling AI assistants to interact with RocketMQ message brokers, manage topics, and monitor message flows through natural language. ([Read more](/details/rocketmq-mcp.md)) `Rocketmq` `Messaging` `Apache`
- [StackGen MCP](https://stackgen.com) - MCP server for infrastructure lifecycle management with compliance features. Actively developed by StackGen, supports IDEs including Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, and Cline. Ideal for platform teams requiring governance and developer self-service; production ready. ([Read more](/details/stackgen-mcp.md)) `Production Ready` `Compliance` `Infrastructure`
- [StackGen MCP Server](https://stackgen.com) - MCP server for infrastructure lifecycle management with built-in compliance and governance, designed for platform teams that need developer self-service with guardrails. Supports infrastructure provisioning, policy enforcement, and environment management through AI agents. ([Read more](/details/stackgen-mcp-server.md)) `Infrastructure Lifecycle` `Compliance` `Platform Engineering`
- [Terraform MCP](https://www.terraform.io) - MCP server for infrastructure as code automation. Enterprise-backed by HashiCorp, supports VS Code, Cursor, Claude Code. Best for teams heavily using Terraform; production ready. ([Read more](/details/terraform-mcp.md)) `Enterprise Backed` `Production Ready` `Infrastructure As Code`

## Reference Implementations & Examples

- [MCP Servers (modelcontextprotocol)](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - Reference MCP server exercising all features of the MCP protocol. Official reference implementation with 84K stars. ([Read more](/details/mcp-servers-modelcontextprotocol.md)) `Reference` `Official` `Protocol`
- [MCP Servers Reference](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - MCP server that exercises all features of the MCP protocol, serving as reference implementation. ([Read more](/details/mcp-servers-reference.md)) `Reference` `Protocol` `Open Source`
- [AI_Claude_MCP](https://github.com/michaelnguyen102/AI_Claude_MCP) - A collection of AI-related projects integrating Claude with MCP, providing various utility tools and integrations for AI-enhanced workflows. ([Read more](/details/ai_claude_mcp.md)) `Claude` `Ai Tools` `Collection`
- [AWS KB Retrieval MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers-archived/aws-kb-retrieval) - Archived reference MCP server for retrieval from AWS Knowledge Base using Bedrock Agent Runtime. ([Read more](/details/aws-kb-retrieval-mcp-server.md)) `Archived` `Aws` `Knowledge Base` `Retrieval`
- [Azure MCP Agent with LangChain.js](https://github.com/Azure-Samples/mcp-agent-langchainjs) - Serverless AI agent Model Context Protocol implementation using LangChain.js and Azure integration for intelligent burger restaurant ordering, demonstrating practical MCP integration patterns for real-world APIs. ([Read more](/details/azure-mcp-agent-with-langchainjs.md)) `Azure` `Langchain` `Serverless`
- [Base MCP Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io) - Standard protocol definition for MCP servers featuring three-core architecture, universal compatibility, and standardized interfaces using JSON-RPC 2.0 communication. ([Read more](/details/base-mcp-protocol.md)) `Protocol` `Standard` `Json Rpc`
- [Brave Search MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers-archived/brave-search) - Archived MCP server for web and local search using Brave's Search API. Replaced by official server. ([Read more](/details/brave-search-mcp-server.md)) `Archived` `Search Engine` `Brave`

([Read more](/details/create-python-mcp-server.md)) `Python` `Cli` `Scaffolding`

- [Fetch MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/fetch) - MCP server for web content fetching and conversion optimized for efficient LLM usage. - [Filesystem](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/filesystem) - The Filesystem MCP server provides secure access to local filesystems for read/write operations, directory listing, metadata retrieval, and file management, incorporating security measures like sandboxing, configurable access controls, and permission enforcement. Key features include multi-format file support and efficient IO operations suitable for diverse use cases. Ideal for AI agent file management such as backups, content generation, and local data handling; offers direct local access unlike cloud-centric alternatives like AWS S3 MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/filesystem.md)) `Reference` `Open Source` `File Operations` `Access Control` `Filesystem` `Storage` `File Io`
- [Filesystem MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/filesystem) - Secure file operations MCP server with configurable access controls. Unlike full reference servers, these prioritize core concepts and ease of setup, with security guidance for production hardening. ([Read more](/details/quickstart-resources.md)) `Open Source` `MCP Example` `Tutorial`
- [Ruby MCP Server](https://github.com/funwarioisii/ruby-mcp) - A lightweight Ruby framework for building MCP servers with a Sinatra-like DSL, enabling Ruby developers to create Model Context Protocol servers quickly and easily. ([Read more](/details/ruby-mcp-server.md)) `Ruby` `Sinatra` `Dsl`
- [Sequential Thinking MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/sequential-thinking) - MCP server for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences. Reference implementation for advanced reasoning features. ([Read more](/details/sequential-thinking-mcp-server.md)) `Reasoning` `Problem Solving` `Open Source`
- [SSE MCP Framework](https://github.com/sidharthrajaram/sse-mcp-clients-and-servers) - A working pattern for SSE-based MCP clients and servers, providing a reference implementation for Server-Sent Events transport in the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/sse-mcp-framework.md)) `Sse` `Transport` `Reference`
- [Swift MCP Server](https://github.com/kapilduraphe/swift-mcp-server) - Model Context Protocol server built in Swift that leverages the distributed actor model to enable type-safe, asynchronous remote invocation of tools, resources, and prompts. ([Read more](/details/swift-mcp-server.md)) `Swift` `Type Safe` `Distributed Actors`
- [Time](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/time) - MCP server offering time and timezone conversion capabilities. Official reference implementation. ([Read more](/details/time.md)) `Reference` `Open Source` `Time` `Timezone` `Datetime` `Utilities`
- [Time MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/servers/time) - MCP server offering time and timezone conversion capabilities. Simple reference for utility tools. ([Read more](/details/time-mcp-server.md)) `Time` `Timezone` `Datetime` `Utilities` `Open Source`
- [TypeScript MCP Server Starter](https://github.com/MatthewDailey/typescript-mcp-server) - A starter template for building TypeScript MCP servers, providing a clean foundation for developing Model Context Protocol implementations in TypeScript. ([Read more](/details/typescript-mcp-server-starter.md)) `Typescript` `Starter` `Template`

- [Docker MCP Catalog](https://hub.docker.com/mcp) - Official Docker hub for MCP server container images providing containerized MCP servers for Kubernetes, databases, cloud services, and more. Simplifies deployment and distribution of MCP servers through Docker's ecosystem. ([Read more](/details/docker-mcp-catalog.md)) `Docker` `Containers` `Catalog`
- [Docker MCP Toolkit](https://docs.docker.com/ai/mcp-catalog-and-toolkit/) - Docker's comprehensive MCP platform providing 300+ verified containerized servers with versioning, provenance, and security. Integrated management interface in Docker Desktop for setup, profiles, and AI agent connections. ([Read more](/details/docker-mcp-toolkit.md)) `Containers` `Docker` `Orchestration`
- [1Panel MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/1panel-mcp-server) - MCP server implementation that provides 1Panel interaction, enabling AI assistants to manage and interact with 1Panel server management panels through natural language. - [APT MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/apt-mcp) - MCP server which runs Debian package manager (apt) commands through AI agents, enabling package management and system administration via natural language. - [Aranet4 MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/aranet4-mcp) - MCP server to manage your Aranet4 CO2 sensor. Fetch data and store in a local SQLite. Ask questions about historical data. ([Read more](/details/aranet4-mcp.md)) `Iot` `Co2 Sensor` `Data Logging`

([Read more](/details/docker-mcp-compose.md)) `Docker` `Container Orchestration` `Local Development`
- [remote-mcp-server](https://github.com/drdeeks/remote-mcp-server) - Deploy a remote MCP server on Cloudflare Workers with OAuth login, enabling seamless integration with tools like Claude Desktop. ([Read more](/details/remote-mcp-server.md)) `Remote` `Cloudflare` `Oauth`
- [remote-mcp-server (drdeeks)](https://github.com/drdeeks/remote-mcp-server) - Remote MCP server deployable on Cloudflare Workers with OAuth login, enabling seamless integration with tools like Claude Desktop. ([Read more](/details/remote-mcp-server-drdeeks.md)) `Remote` `Cloudflare` `Oauth`
- [remote-mcp-server-authless](https://github.com/shankarpriyank/remote-mcp-server-authless) - Deploy a remote MCP server without authentication on Cloudflare Workers, enabling seamless integration with Cloudflare AI Playground and local MCP clients. ## Blockchain & Web3 MCP Servers

- [Awesome Crypto MCP Servers](https://github.com/badkk/awesome-crypto-mcp-servers) - Curated collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers providing crypto APIs and wallet interactions. Supports transaction querying, NFT management, and DeFi agent use cases, offering a standardized alternative to Web3.js for AI agent integration. ([Read more](/details/awesome-crypto-mcp-servers.md)) `Blockchain` `Crypto` `Web3` `Awesome List`
- [Bitcoin MCP](https://github.com/AbdelStark/bitcoin-mcp) - Enables AI agents to interact with Bitcoin network via RPC: wallet operations, key generation, transaction signing/broadcasting, balance checks. Supports crypto payments and on-chain analysis, contrasting account-based chains like Ethereum. ([Read more](/details/bitcoin-mcp.md)) `Blockchain` `Crypto` `Web3` `Bitcoin` `Wallet`
- [Blockchain Exchange MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/blockchain_exchange) - MCP Server providing access to Blockchain.com Exchange functionality via crypto APIs, enabling AI-driven transaction querying, wallet management, and trading. Supports NFT data and DeFi use cases as an MCP alternative to Web3.js. ([Read more](/details/blockchain-exchange-mcp-server.md)) `Blockchain` `Crypto` `Web3` `Exchange` `Trading`
- [Blockchain MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/blockchain-mcp) - Tatum-powered MCP server for multi-chain Ethereum RPC access, Bitcoin/Solana support, wallet ops, tx signing across 100+ blockchains. Ideal for DeFi bots, NFT minting; unifies APIs unlike chain-specific MCPs. ([Read more](/details/blockchain-mcp.md)) `Blockchain` `Crypto` `Web3` `Multi Chain` `Tatum`

- [Cloudflare MCP Server](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents) - Enables interaction with Cloudflare Workers, KV storage, and DNS settings. - [Cloudflare Workers MCP CLI](https://github.com/zueai/cloudflare-workers-mcp-cli) - CLI to set up and deploy MCP Servers to Cloudflare Workers in seconds. Write TypeScript functions to make Cursor MCP tools. ([Read more](/details/cloudflare-workers-mcp-cli.md)) `Cloudflare` `Workers` `Deployment`
- [Google Cloud MCP](https://github.com/googleapis/gcloud-mcp) - Provides agentic access to Google Cloud resources like compute instances, storage buckets, and IAM roles via natural language. Local deployment only. ([Read more](/details/google-cloud-mcp.md)) `Google Cloud` `Local`
- [Google Cloud MCP Servers](https://github.com/googleapis/gcloud-mcp) - Provides agentic access to Google Cloud resources such as compute instances, storage buckets, and IAM roles via natural language.
