## Cloud Native & DevOps MCP Servers

- [Terraform MCP Server](https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-mcp-server) - HashiCorp's official MCP server integrates Terraform with Kubernetes/AWS/GCP for IaC provisioning, scaling, and state management. Enables agentic workflows for multi-cloud deployments and policy enforcement. LLM-driven IaC evolution, allowing natural language config vs traditional Terraform HCL scripting. ([Read more](/details/terraform-mcp-server.md)) `Kubernetes` `IaC` `Cloud Provider` `Terraform`
- [Airflow MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/airflow-mcp-server) - MCP server connecting Apache Airflow to Kubernetes/AWS for DAG orchestration, task scaling, and workflow deployment. Features LLM-driven pipeline management and monitoring. Agentic use for infra/data ops; conversational alternative to Terraform for dynamic workflow IaC. ([Read more](/details/airflow-mcp-server.md)) `Kubernetes` `IaC` `Cloud Provider` `Airflow`
- [alibaba-cloud-ops-mcp-server](https://github.com/aliyun/alibaba-cloud-ops-mcp-server) - Alibaba Cloud Ops MCP server facilitates cloud resource management via MCP for products like ECS, VPC, RDS, OSS, and CloudMonitor, supporting provisioning, monitoring, and operations automation. Key features include instance start/stop/reboot, metrics retrieval for CPU/memory/disk, and OOS-orchestrated workflows. Suited for DevOps automation with AI agents, offering Alibaba Cloud-specific IaC unlike Terraform's multi-provider MCP support. ([Read more](/details/alibaba-cloud-ops-mcp-server.md)) `Cloud` `DevOps` `IaC`
- [Amazon Data Processing MCP Server](https://awslabs.github.io/mcp/servers/aws-dataprocessing-mcp-server) - Amazon Data Processing MCP Server enables cloud resource management for AWS Glue and EMR via MCP, offering orchestration, provisioning, and real-time monitoring of data pipelines. Key features include job management, pipeline visibility, and status inspection for Glue/EMR workflows. Use for DevOps automation with AI agents in data engineering, providing AWS-specific data IaC versus Terraform's general infrastructure MCP. ([Read more](/details/amazon-data-processing-mcp-server.md)) `Cloud` `DevOps` `IaC`

- [Education Data MCP Server](https://github.com/ckz/education-data-mcp-server) - Server accessing Urban Institute's Education Data API for U.S. schools, districts, colleges. - [Fiscal Data MCP Server](https://github.com/QuantGeekDev/fiscal-data-mcp-server) - Server connecting to U.S. Treasury Fiscal Data API for government financial data. Fetches daily treasury statements with hourly caching for 30 days of historical data. ([Read more](/details/fiscal-data-mcp-server.md)) `Finance` `Government` `Open Source`
- [GRID MCP](https://github.com/GRID-is/claude-mcp) - An MCP server for using GRID API directly from Claude for Desktop, enabling spreadsheet automation and data analysis through natural language. ([Read more](/details/grid-mcp.md)) `Grid` `Spreadsheets` `Data Analysis`

## Data Science MCP Servers

- [MCP Pandas](https://github.com/alistairwalsh/mcp-pandas) - MCP Pandas server enables AI agents to perform data analysis on CSV files using the Pandas library in containerized environments. Features include DataFrame operations, statistical analysis, and visualizations with libraries like Matplotlib and Seaborn. Ideal for AI data science use cases, offering extensive compatibility compared to Polars MCP. ([Read more](/details/mcp-pandas.md)) `Pandas` `Data Analysis`
- [Claude MCP Data Explorer](https://github.com/tofunori/claude-mcp-data-explorer) - Server for analyzing CSV data within Claude using Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, and visualization libraries. Supports loading CSV and running scripts for exploratory data analysis. ([Read more](/details/claude-mcp-data-explorer.md)) `Csv` `Pandas` `Open Source`

## Database MCP Servers

- [Oracle Autonomous AI Database MCP Server](https://blogs.oracle.com/machinelearning/announcing-the-oracle-autonomous-ai-database-mcp-server) - Oracle Autonomous AI Database MCP Server is a built-in, multi-tenant MCP server in Oracle's Autonomous AI Database Serverless (19c/26ai), exposing endpoints for AI agents to invoke Select AI Agent tools. Key features include native integration, enterprise security (RBAC, encryption, VPD), and OCI console management without standalone infrastructure. Ideal for governed AI data access in enterprise environments; surpasses open-source PostgreSQL MCP with deep Oracle security and multi-tenancy. ([Read more](/details/oracle-autonomous-ai-database-mcp-server.md)) `Enterprise` `Oracle` `Ai Database` `Sql` `Querying`
- [Aurora DSQL MCP Server](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp/tree/main/src/aurora-dsql-mcp-server) - Aurora DSQL MCP Server provides AI agents with direct SQL query access to Amazon Aurora databases via MCP. Key features include open-source implementation by AWS Labs, easy installation via uvx, and support for direct SQL execution. Use cases encompass AI-driven data retrieval and analysis; compared to general PostgreSQL MCP, it offers native AWS Aurora optimization and serverless compatibility. ([Read more](/details/aurora-dsql-mcp-server.md)) `Open Source` `Aws` `Database` `Sql` `Querying`
- [Composio Supabase MCP Server](https://mcp.composio.dev/supabase) - Composio Supabase MCP Server enables AI agents to explore schemas, execute read-only queries, and generate migrations in Supabase databases. Features: query debugging, optimization with secure auth. Use cases: database management from IDEs; vs native Supabase console/API. ([Read more](/details/composio-supabase-mcp-server.md)) `Supabase` `Automation` `Composio`
- [DBHub Database](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/dbhub) - DBHub Database is a universal MCP server connecting AI assistants to multiple databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite for querying and management. It supports broad database compatibility and direct query execution. Perfect for AI agent data access across heterogeneous databases; stands out from single-DB MCP servers like PostgreSQL MCP by offering multi-DB support in one server. ([Read more](/details/dbhub-database.md)) `Universal Database` `Mysql` `Postgresql` `Sqlite` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`
- [Elastic MCP](https://github.com/elastic/elastic-mcp) - Elastic MCP Server allows AI agents to interact with Elasticsearch databases through the Model Context Protocol. Key features include search and analytics query support tailored for Elastic. Suited for AI agent data retrieval in search-heavy use cases; differs from relational PostgreSQL MCP by focusing on full-text search and log analytics. ([Read more](/details/elastic-mcp.md)) `Elasticsearch` `Database` `Search` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`
- [MCP Neo4j Server](https://github.com/da-okazaki/mcp-neo4j-server) - MCP Neo4j Server integrates AI agents with Neo4j graph databases via the Model Context Protocol, enabling Cypher queries and graph traversals. Key features include direct database interaction tools for LLMs. Suited for AI-driven graph data analysis and relationship mapping; contrasts with PostgreSQL MCP by focusing on graph structures rather than tabular data. ([Read more](/details/mcp-neo4j-server.md)) `Neo4j` `Graph Database` `Database` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`
- [MongoDB MCP Server](https://github.com/mongodb-js/mongodb-mcp-server) - Official MCP integration for MongoDB NoSQL databases. Translates natural language questions into complex aggregation pipelines for querying unstructured data. ([Read more](/details/mongodb-mcp-server.md)) `Docker` `Self Hosted` `Mongodb` `Nosql`
- [NihFix.Postgres.Mcp](https://github.com/AlekseyKapustyanenko/NihFix.Postgres.Mcp) - NihFix.Postgres.Mcp enables real-time interactions between AI agents and PostgreSQL databases using SSE and STDIO protocols via MCP. Key features include live query execution and streaming responses. Use cases involve dynamic AI agent data access; similar to other PostgreSQL MCP servers but emphasizes real-time SSE connectivity. ([Read more](/details/nihfixpostgresmcp.md)) `Postgres` `Real Time` `Sse` `Sql` `Querying`
- [PostgreSQL MCP](https://github.com/crystaldba/postgres-mcp) - MCP server providing LLMs with direct execution access to PostgreSQL databases. Enables agents to inspect schemas and run SELECT statements for instant natural language data queries. Supports Docker for self-hosting. ([Read more](/details/postgresql-mcp.md)) `Docker` `Self Hosted` `Postgresql` `Sql`
- [PostgreSQL MCP Server](https://github.com/crystaldba/postgres-mcp) - MCP server providing direct execution access to PostgreSQL databases. Agents can inspect schemas and run SELECT statements to answer questions about data instantly. Supports Docker deployment for self-hosting. ([Read more](/details/postgresql-mcp-server.md)) `Docker` `Self Hosted` `Postgresql` `Sql`
- [Prisma MCP Server](https://www.prisma.io/docs/mcp) - Prisma MCP Server facilitates AI interactions with Prisma for database schema management, ORM operations, Postgres handling, and schema migrations. Key features include Prisma Console integration and official support. Use cases span AI-assisted database development; differs from raw PostgreSQL MCP by adding ORM layer for safer, typed queries. ([Read more](/details/prisma-mcp-server.md)) `Official` `Prisma` `Orm` `Sql` `Querying`
- [SchemaCrawler](https://github.com/schemacrawler/schemacrawler-mcp) - SchemaCrawler MCP Server connects AI agents to relational databases for schema exploration and valid SQL generation via the Model Context Protocol. Key features include querying database structures and interpreting column meanings without direct access. Ideal for AI-assisted database analysis and documentation; complements PostgreSQL MCP by focusing on metadata over data querying. ([Read more](/details/schemacrawler.md)) `Database` `Sql` `Open Source` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`
- [SchemaFlow](https://github.com/schemaflow/schemaflow-mcp) - SchemaFlow MCP Server delivers real-time PostgreSQL and Supabase database schema access to AI-IDEs through secure SSE connections via MCP. Key features include tools like get_schema, analyze_database, and check_schema_alignment for live context. Suited for AI agent development workflows; extends PostgreSQL MCP with real-time schema monitoring and Supabase integration. ([Read more](/details/schemaflow.md)) `Postgresql` `Supabase` `Real Time` `Sql` `Querying`
- [SQLite MCP Server](https://github.com/hannesrudolph/sqlite-mcp-server) - SQLite MCP Server offers safe, read-only access to SQLite databases for LLMs via the Model Context Protocol, using FastMCP with query validation. Key features emphasize security and exploration without write risks. Perfect for lightweight AI agent data retrieval; lighter alternative to PostgreSQL MCP for embedded, file-based databases. ([Read more](/details/sqlite-mcp-server.md)) `Sqlite` `Database Tools` `Read Only` `Sql` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`
- [Supabase Query MCP](https://github.com/alexander-zuev/supabase-query-mcp) - Supabase Query MCP enables comprehensive management of Supabase databases via chat interfaces, supporting read/write queries, management APIs, migrations, and logs. Key features include end-to-end operations for AI agents. Use cases cover full-stack Postgres management; builds on PostgreSQL MCP with Supabase-specific APIs and versioning. ([Read more](/details/supabase-query-mcp.md)) `Supabase` `Database` `Mcp Server` `Sql` `Querying`
- [Valkey MCP Server](https://github.com/awslabs/mcp/tree/main/src/valkey-mcp-server) - Valkey MCP Server provides MCP access to Valkey, a Redis-compatible in-memory key-value store, developed by AWS Labs for key operations and caching. Key features include uvx installation and high-performance queries. Ideal for AI agent caching and real-time data; contrasts PostgreSQL MCP with in-memory speed over persistent storage. ([Read more](/details/valkey-mcp-server.md)) `Open Source` `Aws` `Database` `In Memory` `Querying` `Data Retrieval`

- [PaperMC](https://papermc.io) - A high-performance fork of Spigot for MCP servers, serving as the backbone for serious development setups. It supports plugins like Denizen or Skript for server-side agent scripting. ([Read more](/details/papermc.md)) `Open Source` `High Performance` `Plugins`
- [Blizzard Battle.net MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/battle_net) - An MCP Server for interacting with Blizzard Battle.net services, allowing programmatic access to Blizzard Entertainment’s gaming platform data and features. ([Read more](/details/blizzard-battlenet-mcp-server.md)) `Gaming` `Api Integration` `Platform`
- [Bukkit](https://github.com/Bukkit/Bukkit) - Bukkit is a widely-used MCP server platform in Java, enabling developers to extend and customize Minecraft multiplayer servers through a large plugin ecosystem. ([Read more](/details/bukkit.md)) `Open Source` `Minecraft` `Java` `plugin-ecosystem`
- [Crafty](https://github.com/Crafty-Codes/Crafty) - A Rust-based MCP server designed for high performance and low latency, specifically tailored for AI developers. It integrates well with event loops and custom agents for efficient AI training setups. ([Read more](/details/crafty.md)) `Open Source` `Rust` `High Performance`
- [Cuberite](https://github.com/cuberite/cuberite) - Cuberite is a fast and highly customizable open-source MCP server written in C++, supporting multiplayer functionality across multiple platforms including Android, Linux, macOS, and Windows. ([Read more](/details/cuberite.md)) `Open Source` `Minecraft` `c` `Cross Platform`
- [Malmo](https://github.com/microsoft/malmo) - Microsoft’s AI platform for MCP, supporting custom XML missions, world configurations, and built-in agent APIs. It is useful for rule-based environments despite being slightly dated. ([Read more](/details/malmo.md)) `Open Source` `Microsoft` `Ai Integration`
- [MineRL](https://minerl.io) - A full research suite for training AI agents in MCP environments, featuring Gym-style APIs, mission tasks, and a massive dataset for imitation learning or reinforcement learning. ([Read more](/details/minerl.md)) `Open Source` `Ai Ml` `Research`
- [rcon-mcp](https://github.com/rgbkrk/rcon-mcp) - rcon-mcp is an MCP server for Dockerized Minecraft instances using itzg's minecraft-server container, enabling AI agents to administer servers via RCON with security through protocol isolation and no persistent shell access. It exposes comprehensive RCON command tools for LLMs, supporting programmatic execution without custom scripting. Use cases include AI-orchestrated in-game builds, real-time server moderation, player management, and automated backups; unlike basic RCON clients, it's optimized for AI workflows with direct MCP integration for tools like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Zed. ([Read more](/details/rcon-mcp.md)) `Mcp Server` `Minecraft` `RCON` `Game Management` `Ai Agent`

([Read more](/details/oktopost-mcp-server.md)) `B2b` `Enterprise` `Crm Integration`

## Web Scraping

- [Firecrawl MCP Server](https://github.com/mendableai/firecrawl) - Firecrawl MCP server turns websites into clean, LLM-ready data by scraping URLs into markdown or structured JSON, crawling sites, searching the web, extracting structured data, and providing browser interaction tools. It offers 13+ tools including scraping, crawling, mapping, extraction, agent-based research, and persistent browser sessions for multi-step automation. Widely used for web research, competitor audits, and data gathering directly in AI coding environments. ([Read more](/details/firecrawl-mcp-server.md)) `Web Scraping` `Content Extraction` `Browser Automation`
- [Bright Data MCP Server](https://brightdata.com/products/mcp-server) - Discover, extract, and interact with the web - one interface powering automated access across the public internet. Sponsored MCP server for web data extraction and interaction. ([Read more](/details/bright-data-mcp-server.md)) `Sponsor` `Web Scraping` `Data Extraction`
- [Firecrawl](https://www.firecrawl.dev/) - Specialized provider for web crawling and scraping, converting web pages into structured formats like JSON or Markdown for AI agent consumption. Supports authenticated scraping and dynamic content handling via MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/firecrawl.md)) `Web Scraping` `Mcp` `Content Extraction`
- [ScrapeGraphAI](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/ScrapeGraphAI-mcp) - AI-powered web scraping library that creates scraping pipelines using natural language. MCP server for intelligent web scraping. ([Read more](/details/scrapegraphai.md)) `Web Scraping` `Ai Powered` `Open Source`

## Aggregators

- [1MCP Agent](https://github.com/1mcp-app/agent) - A unified Model Context Protocol server implementation that aggregates multiple MCP servers into one. ([Read more](/details/1mcp-agent.md)) `Open Source` `Unified` `Aggregation`
- [1mcp-app/agent](https://github.com/1mcp-app/agent) - Unified Model Context Protocol server implementation aggregating multiple MCP servers into one. Ranked in aggregators. Apache-2 licensed. ([Read more](/details/1mcp-appagent.md)) `Unified` `Aggregation` `Apache 2`
- [AnyQuery](https://github.com/julien040/anyquery) - Query more than 40 apps with one binary using SQL. It can also connect to your PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite compatible databases as an MCP server. ([Read more](/details/anyquery.md)) `Sql` `Multi App` `Database`
- [BoltMCP](https://github.com/boltmcp/boltmcp) - Enterprise-grade MCP orchestration platform to create, deploy, and manage custom MCP servers on-premises. Unlicensed. ([Read more](/details/boltmcp.md)) `Enterprise` `Orchestration` `On Premises`
- [Claude Skills MCP](https://github.com/K-Dense-AI/claude-skills-mcp) - Intelligent search capabilities to let every model and client use Claude Agent Skills like native. ([Read more](/details/claude-skills-mcp.md)) `Open Source` `Claude` `Skills`
- [Kno2gether MCP Servers](https://github.com/avijeett007/kno2gether-mcp-servers) - Kno2gether MCP Servers aggregates multiple MCP endpoints into a single unified interface, acting as a multi-server proxy for seamless access to various tools. It simplifies tool calling for AI agents by providing a consolidated endpoint, supporting agent chaining and model switching. Compared to meta-servers like Pipedream, it offers lighter-weight MCP-specific aggregation without general workflow overhead. ([Read more](/details/kno2gether-mcp-servers.md)) `Aggregator` `Multi Mcp` `Proxy`
- [Lunar](https://github.com/TheLunarCompany/lunar) - MCPX is a production-ready, open-source gateway to manage MCP servers at scale, centralize tool discovery, access. ([Read more](/details/lunar.md)) `Open Source` `Gateway` `Production Ready`
- [Lunar MCPX](https://github.com/TheLunarCompany/lunar) - Production-ready, open-source gateway to manage MCP servers at scale with centralized tool discovery and access. Ranked in aggregators. ([Read more](/details/lunar-mcpx.md)) `Open Source` `Gateway` `Production Ready`
- [Magg](https://github.com/sitbon/magg) - Magg is a meta-MCP server acting as a universal hub that allows LLMs to autonomously discover, install, and orchestrate MCP servers without static configurations. Key features include self-managing server lifecycles, plugin-style extensions, and seamless dynamic integrations. Use cases include adaptive AI agent tool calling where toolsets evolve on-the-fly; contrasts with fixed gateways like Microsoft MCP Gateway by enabling LLM-driven ecosystems. ([Read more](/details/magg.md)) `Meta Mcp` `Autonomous` `Discovery`
- [McGravity](https://github.com/tigranbs/mcgravity) - McGravity is a proxy tool that composes multiple MCP servers into one unified endpoint, featuring load balancing, failover, and health checks. It simplifies aggregating tools with minimal overhead and easy configuration. Ideal for scaling AI agent tool calling across distributed servers; a lightweight alternative to comprehensive management layers like Microsoft MCP Gateway. ([Read more](/details/mcgravity.md)) `Proxy` `Load Balancing` `Unified`
- [MCP Access Point](https://github.com/sxhxliang/mcp-access-point) - Turn a web service into an MCP server in one click without making any code changes. ([Read more](/details/mcp-access-point.md)) `Open Source` `Proxy` `One Click`
- [MCP Gateway](https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-gateway) - Microsoft's official MCP Gateway is a reverse proxy and management layer for MCP servers, enabling scalable, session-aware routing, lifecycle management, and integration with Microsoft Entra ID for authentication. Key features include dynamic server discovery, observability tools, and secure multi-tenant deployments. Ideal for enterprise AI agent tool calling and orchestration, it offers production-grade reliability compared to basic community proxies. ([Read more](/details/mcp-gateway.md)) `Microsoft` `Proxy` `Enterprise` `Auth`
- [MCPJungle](https://github.com/mcpjungle/MCPJungle) - Self-hosted MCP Server registry for enterprise AI Agents. ([Read more](/details/mcpjungle.md)) `Self Hosted` `Registry` `Enterprise`
- [MetaMCP](https://github.com/metatool-ai/metamcp) - MetaMCP is the one unified middleware MCP server that manages your MCP connections with GUI. ([Read more](/details/metamcp.md)) `Open Source` `Gui` `Middleware`
- [MindsDB](https://github.com/mindsdb/mindsdb) - AI's query engine and platform for building AI that answers questions over large-scale federated data. Described as the only MCP server you'll ever need, for aggregators. ([Read more](/details/mindsdb.md)) `Local` `Python` `Ai`
- [Neurolink](https://github.com/juspay/neurolink) - Making enterprise AI infrastructure universally accessible. Edge-first platform unifying 12 providers and 100+ models as an MCP server for aggregators. ([Read more](/details/neurolink.md)) `Open Source` `Enterprise` `Ai Infrastructure`
- [OpenAI GPT Image MCP](https://github.com/SureScaleAI/openai-gpt-image-mcp) - OpenAI GPT Image MCP server delivers image generation, editing, and analysis using OpenAI's GPT models and DALL-E via MCP for seamless AI agent integration. Key features include API key auth, vision capabilities, and tool-calling endpoints for images. Use cases span visual content creation in agent workflows; focused on GPT-powered imagery compared to generic image MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/openai-gpt-image-mcp.md)) `OpenAI` `Image Generation` `GPT`
- [Pipedream](https://pipedream.com) - Connect APIs remarkably fast for developers as an aggregator MCP server in cloud JavaScript environments. ([Read more](/details/pipedream.md)) `Cloud` `Javascript`
- [PluggedIn MCP Proxy](https://github.com/VeriTeknik/pluggedin-mcp-proxy) - A comprehensive proxy server that combines multiple MCP servers into a single interface with extensive visibility. ([Read more](/details/pluggedin-mcp-proxy.md)) `Open Source` `Proxy` `Visibility`

- [OpenAPI MCP Server](https://github.com/ivo-toby/mcp-openapi-server) - MCP server that converts OpenAPI specifications into MCP resources, enabling LLMs to understand and interact with API documentation directly through the Model Context Protocol. - [OpenAPI-to-MCPServer](https://github.com/higress-group/openapi-to-mcpserver) - Lightweight Go CLI tool by Higress Group converting OpenAPI specs to YAML/JSON for Higress API Gateway deployment. ([Read more](/details/openapi-to-mcpserver.md)) `Cli` `Openapi` `Mcp Server Generation` `Static` `Gateway`
- [Speakeasy](https://www.speakeasy.com/openapi-to-mcp) - Fully integrated MCP generator that creates MCP servers from OpenAPI definitions and integrates them into SDKs. ([Read more](/details/speakeasy.md)) `Openapi` `Mcp Generation` `Sdk` `Typescript` `Static`

Pay-per-call via x402 ($0.01–$0.05 USDC). ([Read more](/details/cryptoiz-mcp.md)) `Solana Dex` `Whale Intelligence` `X402` `Scalping`

([Read more](/details/flash-payment-system.md)) `Bitcoin Runes` `Write Capable` `Stablecoin` `Open Source`

- [codebase-memory-mcp](https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp) - Fastest code intelligence MCP server that indexes the Linux kernel (28M LOC) in 3 minutes and answers structural queries in under 1ms. Offers 120x fewer tokens usage and deploys as a single static binary compatible with 10 coding agents. ([Read more](/details/codebase-memory-mcp.md)) `Open Source` `Code Intelligence` `Knowledge Graph` `Multi Language`

([Read more](/details/postgresql-mcp-by-crystaldba.md)) `Docker` `Self Hosted` `Sql`

## Databases & Storage MCP Servers

- [Airtable MCP](https://github.com/alexbruf/airtable-mcp) - Airtable MCP enables natural language querying and access to Airtable databases via MCP for AI agents. Supports CRUD operations on NoSQL spreadsheet data without SQL. Great for agent data retrieval in no-code setups, contrasting direct SDKs with MCP simplicity. ([Read more](/details/airtable-mcp.md)) `Airtable` `NoSQL` `Natural Language`
- [Allizwell MySQL MCP Server](https://github.com/allizwellai/mysql-mcp-server) - Allizwell MySQL MCP Server provides secure read-only access and querying to MySQL databases via MCP. Supports SQL queries, listing databases/tables with security features. Ideal for AI agent data retrieval securely, as an MCP alternative to direct MySQL SDKs. ([Read more](/details/allizwell-mysql-mcp-server.md)) `MySQL` `SQL` `Read Only`
- [Baserow MCP Server](https://github.com/baserow/baserow) - Baserow MCP Server allows AI agents to access and query no-code databases via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Supports CRUD operations on tables and rows for NoSQL-like data management. Perfect for agent data retrieval in collaborative environments, standardizing access over direct SDK integrations. ([Read more](/details/baserow-mcp-server.md)) `No Code` `Database` `NoSQL` `SQL`
- [Chroma MCP Server (privetin)](https://github.com/privetin/chroma) - MCP server implementation providing vector database capabilities through Chroma, enabling LLMs to store, query, and manage vector embeddings for retrieval-augmented generation workflows. ([Read more](/details/chroma-mcp-server-privetin.md)) `Vector Database` `Chroma` `Embeddings` `Ai Native Tool`
- [chroma-mcp](https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma-mcp) - A server providing data retrieval capabilities powered by the Chroma embedding database, enabling AI models to create and retrieve data collections using vector search, full text search, and metadata filtering. ([Read more](/details/chroma-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Vector Database` `Semantic Search` `Data Access` `Chroma` `Mcp Official` `Ai Native Tool`
- [ClickHouse MCP Server](https://github.com/ClickHouse/mcp-server) - Columnar database MCP server for real-time analytics on massive datasets. Features SQL queries with high ingestion rates and efficient compression. Use cases include logs and metrics analysis; contrasts with PostgreSQL MCP's row-based relational model suited for OLAP over transactional workloads. ([Read more](/details/clickhouse-mcp-server.md)) `Database` `SQL` `Analytics`
- [Database](https://github.com/bytebase/dbhub) - Universal MCP server for accessing various databases including PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite via MCP protocol. Supports SQL query execution, CRUD, schema exploration for agent data retrieval. Compares favorably to direct SDKs by providing a consistent MCP gateway for multiple DB types. ([Read more](/details/database.md)) `Mcp Server` `Database` `SQL` `PostgreSQL` `MongoDB`
- [Database MCP Server](https://mcp.so/server/database_mcp_server) - Unified MCP server for database access and querying across multiple SQL databases like SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, SQL Server. Features include CRUD operations, query execution, and schema manipulation via MCP. Suited for AI agent data retrieval, offering a single protocol alternative to multiple direct SDKs. ([Read more](/details/database-mcp-server.md)) `Database` `Mcp Server` `SQL` `PostgreSQL`
- [Filesystem Platform-Agnostic MCP Server](https://github.com/cyanheads/filesystem-mcp-server) - Provides MCP access to platform-agnostic filesystems for secure read/write/search/replace operations on files and directories. Key features include directory tree traversal, regex-based search/replace, atomic writes, path sanitization, and permission controls. Ideal for AI agents managing local files autonomously, RAG pipelines with persistent storage, code editing workflows; vs direct filesystem APIs: MCP adds standardized agentic layer with LLM-friendly tools. ([Read more](/details/filesystem-platform-agnostic-mcp-server.md)) `Filesystem` `File Ops` `Local Files` `Mcp Security` `Read/Write` `Directory Exploration`
- [folder-mcp](https://github.com/okets/folder-mcp) - Provides MCP access to local folders for secure filesystem operations including listing, reading/writing files with sandboxing and path validation. Key features include recursive listing, glob search, MIME detection, configurable roots, and exclusion patterns for .git/node_modules. Use cases: AI agents persisting data autonomously, local RAG pipelines, code generation/editing; vs direct FS libraries: MCP enables agentic workflows with standardized tools. ([Read more](/details/folder-mcp.md)) `Filesystem Access` `Local Storage` `Sandboxed Fs` `File Io` `Read/Write` `Directory Exploration`
- [MCP Qdrant Memory](https://github.com/delorenj/mcp-qdrant-memory) - MCP server providing a knowledge graph implementation with semantic search capabilities powered by Qdrant vector database, enabling AI assistants with persistent, searchable memory. ([Read more](/details/mcp-qdrant-memory.md)) `Qdrant` `Knowledge Graph` `Vector Search` `Ai Native Tool` `Agentic Workflow`
- [MCP Server Filesystem](https://github.com/mcp-server-fs) - Advanced MCP server for local, remote, and virtual filesystems, offering read/write operations, directory listing, metadata retrieval, advanced filtering, and search with robust security including auth controls and sandboxing. Key features: async operations, remote mounting, virtual FS, multi-format support. Perfect for AI agent use cases like backups, RAG pipelines, content generation; more versatile and scalable than basic FS servers or cloud options like AWS S3 MCP. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-filesystem.md)) `Fs Operations` `Virtual Fs` `Async Io` `Read/Write` `Directory Exploration` `Filesystem` `Storage` `File Io`
- [MCP Server Unity Catalog](https://github.com/ognis1205/mcp-server-unitycatalog) - Unity Catalog MCP Server enables querying and governance of Databricks data assets via MCP protocol. Features SQL-based CRUD and discovery across catalogs and tables. Enables AI agent data retrieval in governed environments, unlike direct SDKs which lack MCP compatibility. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-unity-catalog.md)) `Databricks` `SQL` `Data Governance` `PostgreSQL`
- [mcp-filesystem-server (mark3labs)](https://github.com/mark3labs/mcp-filesystem-server) - Provides MCP access to local filesystems for upload/query/sync/read/write operations, enabling AI agents to manage persistent storage securely. Key features include Golang implementation for performance, standardized MCP tools over direct SDKs. Use cases: agentic data persistence in RAG pipelines, autonomous file organization; vs filesystem libraries: adds agentic layer with LLM tool calling. ([Read more](/details/mcp-filesystem-server-mark3labs.md)) `Filesystem` `Storage` `Golang` `Read/Write` `Directory Exploration`
- [PostgreSQL MCP Server](https://github.com/crystaldba/postgres-mcp) - Relational database MCP server enabling AI agents to inspect schemas and execute SELECT queries on PostgreSQL. Supports self-hosting via Docker with natural language to SQL translation. Essential for transactional data access; contrasts with ClickHouse MCP's columnar analytics focus. ([Read more](/details/postgres-mcp-server.md)) `Database` `SQL` `Analytics`
- [Qdrant MCP Local](https://github.com/hirokita117/qdrant-mcp-local) - Docker Compose setup for easily running Qdrant and MCP-server-qdrant in a local environment. Provides vector database operations for development and testing. ([Read more](/details/qdrant-mcp-local.md)) `Qdrant` `Docker` `Local` `Ai Native Tool`
- [Qdrant MCP Server](https://github.com/qdrant/mcp-server-qdrant) - Qdrant MCP server for vector similarity search and storage. ([Read more](/details/qdrant-mcp-server-qdrant.md)) `Vector Database` `Qdrant` `Semantic Search`

## Development Tools Mcp Servers

- [code-mcp](https://github.com/54yyyu/code-mcp) - Code MCP Server enables AI agents to interact with development environments for terminal commands and file operations. Features: shell execution, read/write files via MCP protocol. Use cases: Autonomous coding agents, debugging workflows. Better than basic file MCPs with integrated terminal access. ([Read more](/details/code-mcp.md)) `IDE Integration` `Terminal` `Dev Environment`
- [MCP Server Tree-sitter](https://github.com/wrale/mcp-server-tree-sitter) - Tree-sitter MCP Server enables AI agents to parse code syntax in 100+ languages for analysis and understanding. Features: AST generation, query-based extraction, incremental parsing via MCP protocol. Use cases: Code review agents, refactoring tools, documentation generation. Better than basic parsers with multi-language support and structured output. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-tree-sitter.md)) `IDE Integration` `Code Parsing` `Ast`
- [Xcode MCP Server](https://github.com/r-huijts/xcode-mcp-server) - Xcode MCP Server enables AI agents to interact with Xcode IDE for code editing, building, and debugging in iOS/macOS development. Features: project/workspace management, build/run capabilities via MCP protocol. Use cases: Autonomous coding agents and app development workflows. Better than basic file MCPs with full IDE context. ([Read more](/details/xcode-mcp-server.md)) `IDE Integration` `Xcode` `Apple`

- [Minecraft MCP Server](https://github.com/yuniko-software/minecraft-mcp-server) - MCP server for Minecraft bot control using Mineflayer, allowing AI agents to handle building, exploration, chat, and player interactions via standardized protocol over RCON. - [Minecraft MCP Server (Peterson)](https://github.com/Peterson047/Minecraft-MCP-Server) - Flexible MCP server for Minecraft using RCON protocol and FastMCP, enabling AI control for commands, chat listening, and server management. ([Read more](/details/minecraft-mcp-server-peterson.md)) `Minecraft` `RCON` `Game AI`
- [Mineflayer](https://github.com/PrismarineJS/mineflayer) - JavaScript MCP server framework for Minecraft bot automation, supporting navigation, crafting, combat, chat parsing, and player management via RCON protocol. Use cases: game AI development, automated farming, server testing; vs raw RCON, provides high-level MCP tools for LLMs. ([Read more](/details/mineflayer.md)) `Minecraft` `RCON` `Game AI`

## Gaming MCP Servers

- [Artifacts MMO MCP](https://github.com/djcopley/artifacts-mmo-mcp) - Artifacts MMO MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol implementation for the Artifacts massively multiplayer online action RPG game. It enables AI agents to read game state, execute player actions such as movement, combat, and inventory management, and subscribe to real-time events. Key use cases include building autonomous AI game bots for resource farming, PvP engagements, or exploratory gameplay; compared to generic RCON-based servers like Minecraft MCP, it offers game-specific tools tailored to Artifacts' pixel-art world and mechanics. ([Read more](/details/artifacts-mmo-mcp.md)) `Mmo` `Artifacts` `Gaming` `Game AI` `Server Control`
- [Chess MCP (turlockmike)](https://github.com/turlockmike/chess-mcp) - Chess MCP (turlockmike) is an MCP server providing full chess functionality including game creation, move execution, position evaluation, and integration with analysis engines. It supports standard FEN notation, legal move generation, best move computation, and game history review for single or multiplayer scenarios. Use cases: AI chess bots for opponents or training, puzzle solving, opening preparation; unlike API-only tools like chess-mcp for Chess.com, this offers local server control and extensible engine support. ([Read more](/details/chess-mcp-turlockmike.md)) `Chess` `Board Game` `Analysis` `Game AI` `Server Control`

## Google Cloud MCP Servers

- [AlloyDB for PostgreSQL MCP Server](https://github.com/google/mcp) - Provides MCP access to AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, enabling AI agents to query and manage fully managed, PostgreSQL-compatible databases with columnar engine for high-performance transactional and analytical workloads. Features serverless scaling, IAM authentication, full SQL operations, and integration with Google Cloud services. Ideal for AI-driven database operations and agent querying; as an official Google-managed GA server, it surpasses generic self-hosted DB MCPs in reliability, maintenance, and scalability. ([Read more](/details/alloydb-for-postgresql-mcp-server.md)) `Google Cloud` `Managed Database` `Postgresql` `Serverless`
- [BigQuery MCP Server](https://skyvia.com/blog/mcp-server-for-google-bigquery/) - MCP server bridging AI assistants to Google BigQuery cloud data warehouse. Enables natural language queries, data analysis, and warehouse management while maintaining security controls and cost governance. ([Read more](/details/bigquery-mcp-server.md)) `Data Warehouse` `Analytics` `Sql`

- [SystemPrompt MCP Notion](https://github.com/Ejb503/systemprompt-mcp-notion) - An MCP server that integrates Notion into AI workflows, enabling seamless access to Notion pages, databases, and comments through the Model Context Protocol. - [The Pensieve](https://github.com/seanivore/the-pensieve) - An MCP server for organizing and examining thoughts and conversations, making it easier to spot patterns and links in AI dialogue through structured memory. ## MCP DevTools

- [Firebase MCP Server](https://github.com/gannonh/firebase-mcp-server) - MCP server implementation integrating Firebase services like Firestore, Auth, and Functions. Allows AI models to access Firebase backend via standard MCP protocol. Serverless deployment with real-time capabilities. Compared to generic BaaS adapters, optimized specifically for MCP tool calls. Use cases: AI agents needing scalable storage, authentication, and real-time data syncing. ([Read more](/details/firebase-mcp-server.md)) `Firebase` `Mcp Server` `Serverless`
- [FrontMCP](https://github.com/front-mcp/frontmcp) - TypeScript framework for extensible MCP servers using decorators, DI, and modular design. Facilitates building complex, maintainable MCP services. Compared to simple-mcp, adds structure for larger apps; akin to NestJS for MCP. Use cases: enterprise MCP servers with interdependent tools and scalable architectures. ([Read more](/details/frontmcp.md)) `Typescript` `Framework` `Mcp` `Dependency Injection`
- [Mastra AI](https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra) - TypeScript AI agent framework with native MCP server support for orchestration and tool integration. Enables building composable agents that expose MCP endpoints. Compared to LangGraph or CrewAI, emphasizes MCP interoperability. Use cases: multi-agent systems, workflow automation via MCP-compatible tools. ([Read more](/details/mastra-ai.md)) `Ai Agent` `Framework` `Mcp` `Typescript`
- [MCPcat](https://github.com/mcpcat/mcpcat-ts) - Analytics and monitoring toolkit for MCP servers, featuring user tracking, session replay, and live debugging. Provides insights into tool invocations, errors, and performance. Similar to Sentry or PostHog but MCP-specific. Use cases: observing AI agent behaviors, debugging tool chains, and optimizing MCP performance in production. ([Read more](/details/mcpcat.md)) `Monitoring` `Analytics` `Mcp` `Open Source`
- [simple-mcp](https://github.com/ribeirogab/simple-mcp) - Lightweight TypeScript library for rapidly building MCP servers with minimal boilerplate. Enables defining tools and resources via simple APIs, ideal for prototyping and embedding MCP functionality in Node.js apps. Compared to full frameworks like FrontMCP, prioritizes speed and simplicity over advanced modularity. Use cases include quick MCP service creation for AI agents and lightweight integrations. ([Read more](/details/simple-mcp.md)) `Typescript` `Mcp Sdk` `Open Source`

## MCP Middleware & Orchestration

- [1mcpserver](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - MCP of MCPs that automatically discovers, configures, and adds MCP servers on your local machine. Provides a centralized way to manage multiple MCP servers locally for seamless integration with AI agents. ([Read more](/details/1mcpserver-mcp-server.md)) `Open Source` `Discovery` `Local Management`
- [A2A-MCP Java Bridge](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) - Brings powerful A2A-MCP integration into Java applications, enabling developers to annotate standard Java methods and instantly expose them as MCP Server, A2A-discoverable actions with no boilerplate or service registration overhead. ([Read more](/details/a2a-mcp-java-bridge.md)) `Java` `A2a` `Annotations`
- [Agenium](https://github.com/Aganium/agenium) - Bridge any MCP server to the agent:// network, providing DNS-like identity, discovery, and trust for AI agents. Makes tools discoverable and callable via agent:// URIs with mTLS, trust scores, and capability search. Supports macOS, Windows, Linux. ([Read more](/details/agenium.md)) `Typescript` `Cloud` `Multi Platform`
- [Agent47](https://github.com/espadaw/Agent47) - Unified job aggregator for AI agents across 9+ platforms including x402, RentAHuman, Virtuals. Cloud-based MCP server. ([Read more](/details/agent47.md)) `Typescript` `Cloud`
- [Agoragentic Integrations](https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-integrations) - Agent-to-agent marketplace where AI agents discover, invoke, and pay for services from other agents using USDC on Base L2. Cloud-based. ([Read more](/details/agoragentic-integrations.md)) `Typescript` `Cloud`
- [AI SDK MCP Bridge](https://github.com/vrknetha/aisdk-mcp-bridge) - Bridge package enabling seamless integration between Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and AI SDK tools, supporting multiple server types, real-time communication, and TypeScript. ([Read more](/details/ai-sdk-mcp-bridge.md)) `Ai Sdk` `Typescript` `Real Time`
- [Conduit](https://github.com/codingthefuturewithai/conduit) - Python-based service designed to provide a unified, consistent interface for AI tools and applications to interact with enterprise knowledge and collaboration platforms. - [Emcee](https://github.com/loopwork-ai/emcee) - Connect agents to APIs, providing a bridge between AI agents and REST APIs for seamless integration with external services. ([Read more](/details/emcee.md)) `Api Bridge` `Agents` `Integration`
- [EQTY Lab MCP Server](https://github.com/eqtylab/eqty-mcp) - Manage, Proxy, and Secure your MCP Servers. - [fastn.ai Unified API MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/fastnai) - Remote, dynamic MCP server with a unified API that connects to 1,000+ tools, actions, and workflows, featuring built-in authentication and monitoring. Serves as a universal integration layer for AI agents. ([Read more](/details/fastnai-unified-api-mcp-server.md)) `Unified Api` `Multi Integration` `Workflow Automation`

- [Langchain MCP Connect](https://github.com/lloydhamilton/langchain_mcp_connect) - Tools to easily integrate Anthropic Model Context Protocol (MCP) with LangChain, enabling seamless connectivity between MCP servers and LangChain workflows. - [Loaditout](https://loaditout.dev) - Universal registry for over 20,000 MCP servers and agent skills with A/B/C/F security grading, CLI installer (npx loaditout add), verified publisher badges, and curated packs for discovering and installing MCP tools. - [MCP Proxy](https://github.com/sparfenyuk/mcp-proxy) - MCP server that connects to MCP servers running on SSE transport, or exposes stdio servers as an SSE server using the MCP Proxy server. Acts as a transport layer bridge. ([Read more](/details/mcp-proxy.md)) `Proxy` `Sse` `Transport`

- [MCP SSE Gateway](https://github.com/acehoss/mcp-gateway) - A flexible gateway server that bridges Model Context Protocol (MCP) STDIO servers to MCP HTTP+SSE and REST API. Enables multi-instance MCP servers to be exposed over HTTP. ([Read more](/details/mcp-sse-gateway.md)) `Gateway` `Sse` `Http`
- [MCP stdio HTTP Proxy](https://github.com/punkpeye/mcp-stdio-proxy) - A TypeScript SSE proxy for MCP servers that use stdio transport, enabling stdio-based MCP servers to be accessible over HTTP with SSE transport. ([Read more](/details/mcp-stdio-http-proxy.md)) `Proxy` `Stdio` `Sse`
- [MCP Stdio to HTTP SSE Gateway](https://github.com/boilingdata/mcp-stdio-http-sse-gateway) - An MCP stdio to HTTP SSE transport gateway with example server and MCP client. - [Confluent MCP](https://github.com/confluentinc/mcp-confluent) - Confluent MCP server for the Kafka streaming platform. - [ZeroMQ](https://zeromq.org/) - ZeroMQ core engine in C++, implements ZMTP/3.1. High-performance asynchronous messaging library aimed at use in distributed or concurrent applications. ([Read more](/details/zeromq.md)) `Messaging` `Open Source` `C Plus Plus`

## Messaging MCP Servers

- [MCP Confluent](https://github.com/confluentinc/mcp-confluent) - Confluent integration to interact with Confluent Kafka and Confluent Cloud REST APIs. MIT licensed. ([Read more](/details/mcp-confluent.md)) `Open Source` `Kafka` `Streaming`

## Microsoft Ecosystem MCP Servers

- [Microsoft Clarity MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/clarity-mcp-server) - Microsoft Clarity MCP Server enables AI agents and LLMs to access Microsoft Clarity's website analytics data export API through the Model Context Protocol. Key features include natural language queries for session replays, heatmaps, rage clicks, dead clicks, and user insights. Ideal for AI-driven UX analysis and optimization use cases; it provides conversational access superior to raw API calls or tools like Google Analytics integrations. ([Read more](/details/microsoft-clarity-mcp-server.md)) `Microsoft` `Enterprise` `Analytics` `Local` `Mcp Server`
- [Microsoft Dataverse MCP](https://github.com/microsoft/dataverse-mcp-server) - Microsoft Dataverse MCP Server allows LLMs and AI agents to interact with business data in Dataverse using natural language via MCP. Key features include table discovery, advanced queries, CRUD operations, and custom context-grounded prompts. Perfect for enterprise AI assistants in CRM/ERP scenarios, offering semantic understanding beyond generic database agents like PostgreSQL MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/microsoft-dataverse-mcp.md)) `Microsoft` `Enterprise` `Database` `Crm` `Local`
- [NuGet MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/nuget-mcp-server) - NuGet MCP Server empowers AI agents to search, resolve, and manage .NET packages via the NuGet ecosystem using MCP protocol. Key features encompass package discovery, dependency resolution, version management, and automation workflows. Essential for LLM-assisted .NET development, contrasting with direct NuGet CLI by enabling reasoned package selection in agentic flows. ([Read more](/details/nuget-mcp-server.md)) `Microsoft` `Enterprise` `Package Management` `.net` `Local`
- [Wassette MCP Server](https://github.com/microsoft/wassette) - Wassette MCP Server offers a secure runtime for executing WebAssembly (WASM) components via MCP, enabling safe code execution for AI agents. Features sandboxed environments, component model support, and enterprise-grade isolation. Use cases include secure plugin execution for LLMs; differentiates from wasmtime or WASM runtimes by native MCP tooling compatibility. ([Read more](/details/wassette-mcp-server.md)) `Microsoft` `Enterprise` `Webassembly` `Security` `Sandbox`

([Read more](/details/claude-mcp-weather-server-example.md)) `Mcp` `Weather` `reference-implementation` `Dotnet` `Open Source`

- [ai-distiller](https://github.com/janreges/ai-distiller) - A tool that extracts essential code structure from large codebases into an AI-digestible format; commonly used as an MCP-accessible utility to help AI agents understand and work with complex repositories. - [Assembla MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/assembla) - MCP Server for Assembla’s secure Git and source code management platform, enabling repository and development workflow automation via MCP. ([Read more](/details/assembla-mcp-server.md)) `Repository Management` `Git` `Development`
- [Bitbucket Data Center MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/bitbucket_data_center) - An MCP Server that connects to Bitbucket Data Center, enabling MCP-compatible agents to interact with self-managed Bitbucket repositories for source code collaboration and automation. ([Read more](/details/bitbucket-data-center-mcp-server.md)) `Bitbucket` `Repository Management` `Devops`
- [Code Index MCP](https://github.com/johnhuang316/code-index-mcp) - A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that helps large language models index, search, and analyze code repositories with minimal setup. Demonstrates MCP server use for codebase analysis. ([Read more](/details/code-index-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Code Analysis` `Repository` `Search`
- [code-to-tree](https://github.com/micl2e2/code-to-tree) - code-to-tree is a single-binary Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that converts source code into an abstract syntax tree (AST) representation, regardless of the programming language. It enables MCP-compatible clients to analyze and navigate code structure programmatically via a unified server interface. ([Read more](/details/code-to-tree.md)) `Code Analysis` `Ast` `Multi Language`
- [Code2flow Server](https://deepwiki.com/kursk-ye/code2flow-mcp-server/2.2.1-generate-call-graph-tool) - A server wrapping the code2flow tool as an MCP service, enabling AI applications to generate and access code call graphs using a standardized protocol. Directly demonstrates MCP server integration. ([Read more](/details/code2flow-server.md)) `Mcp` `Code Analysis` `Visualization` `Ai Integration`
- [Code2prompt](https://github.com/odancona/code2prompt-mcp) - Transforms complex codebases into structured summaries optimized for language models through an MCP server, facilitating better code understanding and analysis workflows. Directly relevant as an MCP server. ([Read more](/details/code2prompt.md)) `Mcp` `Code Analysis` `Summarization` `language-models`
- [Codebase Context Dumper](https://github.com/lex-tools/codebase-context-dumper) - A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed for dumping codebase context into LLMs, making it easier for AI models to access relevant project information. Exemplifies MCP server usage. ([Read more](/details/codebase-context-dumper.md)) `Mcp` `Codebase` `Context Management` `Llm Integration`
- [codebase-mcp](https://github.com/dedeveloper23/codebase-mcp) - An MCP server that integrates with RepoMix to enable codebase retrieval and analysis, supporting tasks such as code review and documentation generation. ([Read more](/details/codebase-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Codebase` `Code Analysis` `Documentation` `Integration`
- [Codechecker](https://github.com/jacklandis29/codechecker-mcp) - A code review tool for Cursor IDE that uses OpenAI's GPT models to provide intelligent code analysis and suggestions via an MCP server interface. An MCP server example for code analysis. ([Read more](/details/codechecker.md)) `Mcp` `Code Review` `Openai` `Code Analysis`
- [CodeGraphContext](https://github.com/Shashankss1205/CodeGraphContext) - CodeGraphContext is an MCP server that indexes local code into a graph database, exposing structured code context to AI assistants. It enables graph-based code exploration and reasoning for coding agents via the MCP protocol. ([Read more](/details/codegraphcontext.md)) `Code Analysis` `Graph Database` `Semantic Search`
- [codelogic-mcp-server](https://github.com/CodeLogicIncEngineering/codelogic-mcp-server) - Official MCP server for CodeLogic, providing access to code dependency analytics, architectural risk analysis, and impact assessment tools. ([Read more](/details/codelogic-mcp-server.md)) `Mcp` `Code Analysis` `Analytics` `Integration`
- [Codeql](https://github.com/jordyzomer/codeql-mcp) - Bridges to the CodeQL static analysis engine through an MCP server, allowing for identification of security vulnerabilities and quality issues via structured queries. A prominent MCP server for code analysis. ([Read more](/details/codeql.md)) `Mcp` `Code Analysis` `Security` `quality-assurance`
- [CodeScene MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/codescene) - An MCP Server integration for CodeScene, allowing MCP tools to analyze codebases with CodeScene’s behavioral code analysis and insights that connect code, teams, and business priorities. ([Read more](/details/codescene-mcp-server.md)) `Code Analysis` `quality-assurance` `Analytics`
- [Compiler Explorer Mcp](https://github.com/torshepherd/compiler-explorer-mcp) - A Model Context Protocol server that connects LLMs to the Compiler Explorer API, enabling compilation and exploration of code across different compilers and languages. ## Repository Code Analysis MCP Servers

- [Composio GitHub MCP Server](https://mcp.composio.dev/github) - Composio GitHub MCP Server enables AI agents to manage GitHub repositories, review pull requests, track issues, and handle commits via natural language. Features include full CRUD operations on repo entities with secure auth. Use cases: automate code reviews and issue triage, simpler than native GitHub API for AI integration. ([Read more](/details/composio-github-mcp-server.md)) `Github` `Automation` `Composio`
- [DeepWiki by Devin](https://devin.ai/deepwiki) - Remote, no-auth MCP server providing AI-powered codebase context and answers. Official MCP server for codebase exploration. ([Read more](/details/deepwiki-by-devin.md)) `Official` `Code Analysis` `No Auth`
- [read-docs-mcp](https://github.com/ZebraRoy/read-docs-mcp) - Read-Docs-MCP is an MCP server specialized in reading documentation from Git repositories. It allows AI agents to fetch, parse, and query repo docs like READMEs, wikis, and code comments via natural language. Key features: git integration, markdown rendering, semantic search over docs; use cases: code research, onboarding, troubleshooting without cloning repos. Compared to general repo MCPs like GitHub MCP, it focuses purely on documentation extraction. ([Read more](/details/read-docs-mcp.md)) `Open Source` `Fuzzy Search` `Git` `Git Docs` `Documentation Search` `Repo Reading` `Markdown Parser`
- [Scaffold](https://github.com/scaffold-ai/scaffold) - Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system designed for structural understanding of large codebases. Transforms source code into a living knowledge graph for precise, context-aware interactions beyond simple file retrieval. Suitable for MCP servers enabling advanced code exploration. ([Read more](/details/scaffold.md)) `Rag` `Knowledge Graph` `Open Source`

- [Entrez](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/entrez) - Unofficial MCP server for NCBI Entrez databases, providing access to PubMed articles, gene information, protein data, and other biomedical research resources through NCBI's E-utilities API. ([Read more](/details/academic-search-mcp-server.md)) `Semantic Scholar` `Crossref` `Academic Papers`
- [CMR MCP](https://github.com/podaac/cmr-mcp) - CMR Model Context Protocol example, providing AI assistant integration with NASA's Common Metadata Repository for Earth science data searching and retrieval. ([Read more](/details/cmr-mcp.md)) `Nasa` `Earth Science` `Metadata`
- [CustomGPT MCP](https://github.com/poll-the-people/customgpt-mcp) - MCP server for CustomGPT.ai's anti-hallucination RAG-as-a-service API endpoints. ([Read more](/details/customgpt-mcp.md)) `Rag` `Anti Hallucination` `Cloud`
- [MCP RAGChat](https://github.com/gogabrielordonez/mcp-ragchat) - Add RAG-powered AI chat to any website with one command. Local vector store, multi-provider LLM support, self-contained chat server and embeddable widget. ([Read more](/details/mcp-ragchat.md)) `Rag` `Chat` `Self Hosted`
- [MCP Server Collector](https://github.com/chatmcp/mcp-server-collector) - An MCP server designed to discover and collect other MCP servers from across the internet, building a comprehensive registry of available MCP tools and resources. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-collector.md)) `Discovery` `Internet Crawler` `Registry`
- [MCP Server RSS3](https://github.com/RSS3-Network/mcp-server-rss3) - MCP server integrating RSS3 protocol capabilities, enabling AI assistants to access decentralized information indexing and retrieval through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-rss3.md)) `Rss3` `Decentralized` `Indexing`
- [mcp-compass](https://github.com/liuyoshio/mcp-compass) - MCP Discovery and Recommendation Service that helps users find the right MCP server for their specific needs, serving as a search and recommendation engine for the MCP ecosystem. ([Read more](/details/mcp-compass.md)) `Discovery` `Recommendation` `Search`
- [mcp-papersearch](https://github.com/Lincest/mcp-papersearch) - MCP server for searching Arxiv papers via the Model Context Protocol, enabling AI assistants to discover and retrieve academic papers from the arXiv repository. ([Read more](/details/mcp-papersearch.md)) `Arxiv` `Paper Search` `Academic`
- [mcp-scholarly](https://github.com/adityak74/mcp-scholarly) - MCP server to search for accurate academic articles, providing AI assistants with the ability to query scholarly databases through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/mcp-scholarly.md)) `Academic` `Scholarly Search` `Research`
- [mcp-simple-arxiv](https://github.com/andybrandt/mcp-simple-arxiv) - MCP server that provides LLMs with the ability to search and read papers from arXiv, enabling access to scientific research papers through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/mcp-simple-arxiv.md)) `Arxiv` `Research` `Academic Papers`
- [Needle MCP](https://github.com/needle-ai/needle-mcp) - Integration of Needle in modelcontextprotocol, providing search and retrieval capabilities for MCP-compatible clients. ([Read more](/details/needle-mcp.md)) `Search` `Retrieval` `Needle Ai`
- [PulseMCP Server](https://github.com/orliesaurus/pulsemcp-server) - An MCP server that helps you find and discover other MCP servers listed on PulseMCP.com, serving as a search engine for the growing MCP ecosystem. ([Read more](/details/pulsemcp-server.md)) `Discovery` `Search Engine` `Ecosystem`
- [Vectara MCP](https://github.com/vectara/vectara-mcp) - MCP server for Vectara's trusted RAG-as-a-service platform. ([Read more](/details/vectara-mcp.md)) `Rag` `Trusted` `Open Source`

## Search Rag

([Read more](/details/vectara-mcp-server.md)) `Open Source` `Semantic Search` `Rag`

## Security

- [Ghidra MCP](https://github.com/LaurieWired/GhidraMCP) - MCP Server for Ghidra in local Java environments for security analysis. ([Read more](/details/ghidra-mcp.md)) `Local` `Java`
- [GhidraMCP](https://github.com/LaurieWired/GhidraMCP) - MCP Server for Ghidra, a software reverse engineering suite, enabling local Java-based security analysis for AI assistants. ([Read more](/details/ghidramcp.md)) `Local` `Java` `Open Source`
- [Golf.dev](https://golf.dev) - Security platform for deploying and managing custom MCP servers with authentication, identity management, rate limiting, audit logging, and observability features. Helps teams centralize MCP server deployment through a master server. ([Read more](/details/golfdev.md)) `Deployment` `Rbac` `Rate Limiting`
- [Helmet](https://helmetjs.github.io/) - Help secure Express apps with various HTTP headers. Express middleware for security headers like HSTS, HPKP, etc. ([Read more](/details/helmet.md)) `Express` `Security` `Http Headers`
- [MCP Total](https://mcptotal.com) - Lightweight MCP gateway offering foundational security and observability including logging, guardrails against attacks and data exfiltration, plus EDR scanning to detect shadow MCP usage. ([Read more](/details/mcp-total.md)) `Mcp Gateway` `Edr` `Observability`
- [mcp-server-esignatures](https://github.com/search?q=mcp-server-esignatures) - MCP server for eSignatures, enabling AI agents to handle electronic signature workflows. Useful for legal and compliance tasks in cloud-native environments. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-esignatures.md)) `Legal` `Esignatures` `Compliance`
- [mcp-server-legifrance](https://github.com/search?q=mcp-server-legifrance) - Legifrance MCP Server providing access to French legal data. Supports legal research and compliance checks via MCP protocol. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-legifrance.md)) `Legal` `France` `Compliance`
- [MintMCP](https://mintmcp.com) - MCP security solution that centralizes connections through a gateway, enables logging for auditing, blocks malicious prompts, and restricts sensitive file access. Supports easy deployment of managed and remote MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/mintmcp.md)) `Mcp Gateway` `Logging` `Guardrails`

## Security & Compliance MCP Servers

- [Auth0 MCP Server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@auth0/auth0-mcp-server) - MCP server for Auth0 providing authentication management, vulnerability scanning in identity workflows, and compliance checks. Enables AI agents to perform secure auth operations and agent security audits. Offers conversational access superior to direct REST APIs. ([Read more](/details/auth0-mcp-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [ContrastAPI](https://contrastsecurity.com/) - Security intelligence MCP server offering vulnerability scanning, CVE lookup, and compliance tools across 20 functions. Ideal for AI agent threat intelligence and security audits. Free access outperforms key-required intel services. ([Read more](/details/contrastapi.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [CVE Intelligence Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/cve-intelligence-server) - MCP server delivering CVE data, EPSS scoring, vulnerability scanning, and exploit intelligence for compliance and auth checks. Supports AI agents in threat prioritization and security audits. Aggregates multi-sources better than single DBs. ([Read more](/details/cve-intelligence-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [Keycloak MCP](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/keycloak-mcp) - MCP server for Keycloak authentication management and vulnerability scanning in IAM. Enables agent-driven security audits and compliance ops. Streamlines AI integration over direct API. ([Read more](/details/keycloak-mcp.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [Keycloak MCP Server](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/keycloak) - Keycloak IAM MCP server with 40+ tools for authentication, vulnerability scanning, user/realm management, and compliance. Facilitates AI agent security audits on access controls. Comprehensive MCP interface over basic APIs. ([Read more](/details/keycloak-mcp-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [Maigret MCP Server](https://github.com/BurtTheCoder/mcp-maigret) - OSINT MCP server for username reconnaissance across sources, supporting vulnerability scanning and auth footprinting. Used for AI agent security audits and compliance recon. Broader than single-tool OSINT. ([Read more](/details/maigret-mcp-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [MCP Server Semgrep](https://github.com/Szowesgad/mcp-server-semgrep) - Semgrep MCP server for static code analysis, vulnerability scanning, and security compliance checks. Powers AI agent code reviews and audits. Conversational alternative to CLI Semgrep. ([Read more](/details/mcp-server-semgrep.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [MCP_AI_SOC_Sher](https://github.com/akramIOT/MCP_AI_SOC_Sher) - AI SOC MCP server with Text2SQL for threat detection, vulnerability scanning, auth analysis, and compliance. Enables agent security audits in SOC workflows. AI-enhanced over traditional SIEM. ([Read more](/details/mcp_ai_soc_sher.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [Secure Fetch](https://github.com/secure-fetch-mcp/secure-fetch) - Secure HTTP MCP server with auth and proxying to block local access, supporting vulnerability scanning workflows. Enables safe agent security audits. Enhances standard fetch with MCP security. ([Read more](/details/secure-fetch.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [systemprompt](https://systemprompt.ai) - Self-hosted MCP governance server for policy enforcement, auth controls, vulnerability scanning, and compliance auditing. Supports agent security audits with privacy. On-prem alternative to cloud proxies. ([Read more](/details/systemprompt.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [VirusTotal MCP Server](https://github.com/BurtTheCoder/virustotal-mcp-server) - VirusTotal MCP server for malware/URL/file vulnerability scanning and threat intel with auth. Powers AI agent security audits. Multi-engine consensus beats single scanners. ([Read more](/details/virustotal-mcp-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [WaveGuardClient](https://github.com/gpartin/WaveGuardClient) - Physics-based MCP server for blockchain vulnerability scanning, wallet profiling, auth checks, and compliance in token risks. High-precision AI agent security audits. Outperforms ML detectors (0.90 avg precision). ([Read more](/details/waveguardclient.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`
- [YARA MCP Server](https://github.com/ThreatFlux/YARA-mcp-server) - YARA pattern-matching MCP server for malware vulnerability scanning and security compliance. Enables rule-based agent audits. Signature-focused unlike heuristics. ([Read more](/details/yara-mcp-server.md)) `Vuln Scan` `Auth` `Compliance`

- [Ahrefs MCP](https://ahrefs.com/api) - Official MCP server for Ahrefs SEO data, enabling live keyword research, rank tracking, backlink analysis, and site audits directly in AI workspaces via natural language. ([Read more](/details/ahrefs-mcp.md)) `Read Only` `Official` `Seo`

- [Semrush MCP](https://developer.semrush.com/api/v3/) - Official Semrush MCP server covering Trends API for market analysis and Standard API for keyword, backlink, and domain analytics, providing competitive intelligence data. - [SEO MCP](https://github.com/cnych/seo-mcp) - Leverage Ahrefs data for comprehensive SEO analysis, including backlink and keyword research, through a Model Control Protocol service. ([Read more](/details/seo-mcp.md)) `Ahrefs` `Seo` `Backlinks`

- [csjoblom/musclesworked-mcp](https://github.com/csjoblom/musclesworked-mcp) - Exercise-to-muscle mapping MCP server. - [guillochon/mlb-api-mcp](https://github.com/guillochon/mlb-api-mcp) - MCP server acting as a proxy to the freely available MLB API. Provides player info, stats, and game information for Major League Baseball. ([Read more](/details/guillochon-mlb-api-mcp.md)) `Mlb` `Baseball` `Python`

## Testing Debugging Tools

- [Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio MCP for Spark Troubleshooting and Code Recommendation](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/mcp/servers/sagemaker-unified-studio-spark-troubleshooting-mcp-server) - MCP server that integrates with Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio to provide Apache Spark troubleshooting and real-time code recommendations for error and workload analysis on AWS Glue and EMR deployments. ([Read more](/details/amazon-sagemaker-unified-studio-mcp-for-spark-troubleshooting-and-code-recommendation.md)) `Aws` `Debugging` `Spark`
- [Apidog](https://apidog.com/) - Apidog is a collaborative API development platform that enables users to test, debug, mock, and document APIs. It is particularly relevant to MCP servers as it streamlines the process of testing API connections and managing automated workflows between MCP servers and other tools, making it easier to integrate and automate tasks across systems. ([Read more](/details/apidog.md)) `Api` `Testing` `Debugging` `Automation`
- [Blazemeter MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/blazemeter) - An MCP Server integration for Blazemeter, allowing MCP tools to run large-scale performance tests on websites, applications, and APIs using Blazemeter’s platform. ([Read more](/details/blazemeter-mcp-server.md)) `performance-testing` `Load Testing` `quality-assurance`
- [BrowserStack MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/browserstack) - An MCP Server that connects MCP agents to BrowserStack’s cross-browser and mobile testing platform, enabling automated testing workflows via MCP. ([Read more](/details/browserstack-mcp-server.md)) `Testing` `Browser` `Automation`
- [claude-debugs-for-you](https://github.com/jasonjmcghee/claude-debugs-for-you) - An MCP server and VS Code Extension that enables automatic debugging via breakpoints and expression evaluation across languages. It allows any LLM (e.g., Claude) to interactively debug any programming language via MCP and a VS Code Extension, providing debugging capabilities through the Model Context Protocol. ([Read more](/details/claude-debugs-for-you.md)) `Mcp` `Debugging` `VSCode` `Ai Integration`
- [claude-mcp-weather-server](https://www.weatherapi.com/) - An example implementation of an MCP server that provides weather data using the National Weather Service API. Serves as a practical reference for building and running MCP servers, highly relevant for developers seeking inspiration or templates for their own MCP servers. `Mcp` `Weather` `reference-implementation` `Examples`
- [Codacy MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/codacy) - An MCP Server for Codacy, providing MCP-compatible access to Codacy’s DevOps intelligence and code quality metrics for automation and analysis workflows. ([Read more](/details/codacy-mcp-server.md)) `Code Quality` `Devops` `Analytics`
- [Code Climate MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/code_climate) - MCP Server for Code Climate, providing access to code quality and analytics data through the MCP ecosystem. ([Read more](/details/code-climate-mcp-server.md)) `Code Quality` `Analytics` `Development`
- [currents-mcp](https://github.com/currents-dev/currents-mcp) - MCP server enabling AI agents to fix Playwright test failures reported to Currents, integrating CI/CD test management with MCP. ([Read more](/details/currents-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Testing` `Cicd` `Ai Agent`
- [Cybermcp](https://github.com/ricauts/cybermcp) - An MCP server providing API security testing tools, including authentication and vulnerability scanning, with detailed severity ratings and remediation—illustrating security-focused MCP server capabilities. ([Read more](/details/cybermcp.md)) `Mcp` `Security` `Testing` `Vulnerability` `Api`
- [Dafny Mcp](https://github.com/namin/dafny-mcp) - Integrates with Dafny for code correctness verification via formal specification analysis—a specialized MCP server for formal methods and verification. ([Read more](/details/dafny-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Verification` `formal-methods` `Code Analysis`
- [dap-mcp](https://pypi.org/project/dap-mcp/) - An MCP server bridging debugging tools with AI systems via the Debug Adapter Protocol, enabling debugger control and enhanced workflows—showcasing developer tool integration in MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/dap-mcp.md)) `Mcp` `Debugging` `Developer Tools` `Integration`

## Testing Debugging Tools

- [MCP CLI (wong2)](https://github.com/wong2/mcp-cli) - CLI tool for testing MCP servers. GPL-3.0 licensed utility for MCP development. ([Read more](/details/mcp-cli-wong2.md)) `Cli` `Testing` `Gpl`
- [MCP DevTools](https://github.com/dxheroes/mcp-devtools) - MCP DevTools provides a suite of tools for testing and developing MCP servers locally, including mock servers and an inspector UI for debugging. It streamlines MCP protocol interactions, making it easier to inspect requests and responses without external dependencies. Superior to basic curl commands for MCP-specific debugging and validation. ([Read more](/details/mcp-devtools.md)) `Devtools` `Testing` `Inspector`
- [mcp-cli (IBM)](https://github.com/IBM/mcp-cli) - CLI tool for testing MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/mcp-cli-ibm.md)) `Open Source` `Cli` `Testing`
- [Proxyman MCP](https://proxyman.io/mcp) - Proxyman MCP allows AI to inspect HTTP traffic, create debugging rules, and control Proxyman - all through natural language conversations. Official MCP server for HTTP debugging. ([Read more](/details/proxyman-mcp.md)) `Official` `Http` `Debugging`
- [wong2/mcp-cli](https://github.com/wong2/mcp-cli) - CLI tool for testing MCP servers. ([Read more](/details/wong2mcp-cli.md)) `Open Source` `Cli` `Testing`
