## Workflow & Orchestration MCP Servers

- [0codekit MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/_0codekit) - Low-code/no-code MCP server for building workflows with API integrations, supporting tool chaining and state management for AI agent flows. Compared to LangGraph, it provides native MCP compatibility for seamless integration in AI assistants without additional graph abstractions. ([Read more](/details/0codekit-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `No Code`
- [1SaaS MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/onesaas) - MCP server integrating 1SaaS low-code platform for workflow automation across APIs, featuring chaining and state persistence for agent-driven processes. Offers MCP-native orchestration superior to LangGraph for direct AI tool usage. ([Read more](/details/1saas-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Low Code`
- [Airslate MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/airslate) - Document workflow MCP server integrating airSlate ecosystem for automation, supporting chaining, state mgmt for agent document processing flows. MCP integration provides simpler setup than LangGraph for document orchestration. ([Read more](/details/airslate-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Document Automation`
- [AITable.ai MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/aitable_ai) - MCP server for AITable.ai automating data flows across apps, with workflow chaining and state management optimized for agent orchestration. Advantages over LangGraph include direct database automation in MCP environments. ([Read more](/details/aitableai-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Database`
- [AWS HealthOmics MCP Server](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/mcp/servers/aws-healthomics-mcp-server) - MCP server for AWS HealthOmics enabling life science workflow generation, execution with chaining and state mgmt for agent-driven bioinformatics. MCP focus contrasts LangGraph's LLM-centric graphs. ([Read more](/details/aws-healthomics-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Healthcare`
- [AWS Step Functions MCP Server](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/mcp/servers/stepfunctions-tool-mcp-server) - Orchestrates complex workflows via AWS Step Functions MCP server, supporting chaining, state machines for robust agent flows. Superior scalability vs LangGraph for production orchestration. ([Read more](/details/aws-step-functions-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Aws`
- [Biztera MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/biztera) - MCP server for Biztera decision management and approvals, enabling chained workflows with state tracking for agent approval flows. MCP simplicity beats LangGraph for approval-specific orchestration. ([Read more](/details/biztera-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Approvals`
- [Blog publisher MCP server](https://mcp.so/server/blog_publisher_mcp_server) - Python MCP server for automating blog publishing workflows from Markdown to GitHub, supporting chaining and state for agent content flows. Simpler MCP deployment vs LangGraph for publishing pipelines. ([Read more](/details/blog-publisher-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Automation`
- [BotX MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/botx) - No-code AI workflow MCP server for ChatGPT orchestration, with chaining and state mgmt for agent flows. MCP-native vs LangGraph's code-heavy setup. ([Read more](/details/botx-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `No Code`
- [n8n](https://n8n.io) - Open-source node-based workflow tool as MCP server, enabling chaining, state mgmt for agent flows. Self-hosted flexibility surpasses LangGraph for production. ([Read more](/details/n8n.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Open Source`
- [Pipedream MCP Server](https://github.com/PipedreamHQ/pipedream/tree/master/mcp) - Pipedream MCP Server integrates Pipedream's workflow automation platform into MCP, allowing AI agents to trigger workflows and access 2,500+ APIs via prebuilt connectors. It enables serverless execution of complex automations directly from agent tool calls. Compares to native MCP servers by adding no-code workflow orchestration. ([Read more](/details/pipedream-mcp-server.md)) `Workflows` `Automation` `No Code`
- [wanaku](https://github.com/wanaku-ai/wanaku) - SSE-based MCP router for orchestrating multiple servers, supporting tool chaining and state via extensible routing. Lightweight alternative to LangGraph for MCP proxying. ([Read more](/details/wanaku.md)) `Workflow` `Orchestration` `Router`

## Workflow Automation Mcp Servers

- [Airplane MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/airplane) - An MCP Server that connects to Airplane, turning APIs, SQL queries, and scripts into internal apps accessible through MCP-enabled agents and tools. ([Read more](/details/airplane-mcp-server.md)) `Internal Tools` `Automation` `scripts`
- [Basin MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/basin) - An MCP Server for Basin, providing MCP-compatible access to its form backend services for processing form submissions without custom server code. ([Read more](/details/basin-mcp-server.md)) `Forms` `Backend` `Automation`
- [Captain Data MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/captaindata) - An MCP Server for Captain Data, enabling data extraction and automation workflows to be orchestrated by MCP-based agents using Captain Data’s platform. ([Read more](/details/captain-data-mcp-server.md)) `Data Extraction` `Automation` `Rpa`
- [Cflow MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/cflow) - An MCP Server that integrates with Cflow’s cloud BPM and workflow automation platform, allowing MCP tools to automate and manage organizational workflows. ([Read more](/details/cflow-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow Automation` `bpm` `Business`
- [CodeREADr MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/codereadr) - MCP Server integration for CodeREADr, enabling barcode scanning and data collection workflows to be used via MCP-compatible agents and tools. ([Read more](/details/codereadr-mcp-server.md)) `Data Collection` `Workflow Automation`
- [CommCare MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/commcare) - MCP Server for CommCare, allowing model-context tools to design and interact with CommCare mobile and web app workflows. ([Read more](/details/commcare-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow Automation` `Forms`
- [Cronfree MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/cronfree) - An MCP Server for Cronfree Time Scheduler, allowing MCP clients to create and manage recurring tasks and no-code automation schedules programmatically. ([Read more](/details/cronfree-mcp-server.md)) `task-automation` `Scheduling` `No Code`
- [DailyBot MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/dailybot) - An MCP Server integration for DailyBot that enables automation of async meetings, milestone tracking, and routine workflows inside work chat platforms. ([Read more](/details/dailybot-mcp-server.md)) `Workflow Automation` `Meetings` `Productivity`
- [Damstra Forms MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/damstra_forms) - An MCP Server for Damstra Forms, exposing its digital forms and mobile data capture features to MCP-compatible systems. ([Read more](/details/damstra-forms-mcp-server.md)) `Forms` `Data Collection` `Workflow Automation`
- [DataScope MCP Server](https://mcp.pipedream.com/app/datascope) - An MCP Server for DataScope that allows MCP clients to interact with mobile forms, field data collection, and offline submissions within automated workflows. ([Read more](/details/datascope-mcp-server.md)) `Forms` `Data Collection` `field-service`
- [Zapier MCP Server](https://zapier.com/mcp) - MCP server enabling LLMs to interact with thousands of apps via Zapier workflows, triggers, and automations. Supports no-code automation builder for hosted cloud-based context delivery. ([Read more](/details/zapier-mcp-server.md)) `Automation` `Integrations` `Cloud`
